Custom Advent Banners for Church Services & Seasonal Displays

Durable Full-Color Vinyl Advent Banners — Customize & Order Online at Banners.com

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (Height x Width): Quantity: Design Method: - Template Design - Upload a File - Professional Designer PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Advent Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Church Displays

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Celebrate the Advent season with a professionally printed custom Advent banner from Banners.com. Whether you need an outdoor banner to invite your community to Advent services or an indoor display featuring Peace, Hope, Love, and Joy, our full-color vinyl Advent banners deliver vibrant, eye-catching results that make a lasting impression.

At Banners.com, we take pride in delivering Advent banners you are proud to display. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They understand the importance of your church's messaging and work closely with you to bring your Advent vision to life. Every order goes through strict quality checks, and if something does not meet our standards, our in-house graphic designers will contact you to resolve it immediately.

We offer a wide selection of custom Advent banner sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your banner arrives before your Advent services begin. Choose from dozens of Advent-themed templates or upload your own design to get started.

Have questions about your Advent banner? Give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be happy to help. Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request through our custom quote process.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Material Options for Advent Banners

Every Advent banner is printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant, full-color results. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Choose from six customizable banner materials to match your church's indoor or outdoor display needs.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (e.g., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please contact customer service to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl

Our most popular banner material. The 13 oz matte vinyl has a low shine and rich color gamut, making it an excellent choice for Advent banners displayed both indoors and outdoors.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl

The 13 oz gloss vinyl material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics. This option gives your Advent banner a polished, high-end appearance.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl

Our toughest material. The extra heavy-duty 18 oz matte vinyl has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality — ideal for Advent banners that need to withstand extended outdoor display.

Mesh Material

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh featuring a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows 37% airflow. Mesh is ideal for outdoor Advent banner installations in windy conditions.

Fabric Material

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor Advent displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel within your church sanctuary.

Adhesive Vinyl

Standard Tack Vinyl: Can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: White calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces — a great option for mounting Advent banners on challenging surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Mounting Options for Advent Banner Installation

Heat-Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of vinyl banner material folded over and heat-welded together to form a strong hem. Hems are recommended for all Advent banners to increase durability.

When selecting hems and grommets, the following options are available:

Top and Bottom Only Hems — Standard finishing option for vinyl Advent banners. Grommets are typically added every 2–4 feet.

All Four Sides Hems — All 4 sides of the banner are heat-welded and grommeted for maximum security during installation.

Pole Pockets for Advent Banner Displays

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner — ideal for hanging Advent banners from dowels or poles in your church.

  • 2" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets — fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

Selecting pole pockets will not increase the finished size of your Advent banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength with a triangular piece of vinyl applied and grommeted at each corner of the banner — recommended for outdoor Advent banner installations.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems feature a PVC-coated webbing that increases the overall strength and wind resistance of your Advent banner.

Reinforced hems cannot be combined with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Advent Banner Finishing

Double-sided finishing is available for Advent banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

For more details, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

Wind slits are not recommended for banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Advent Banners

Flexible production time options allow you to choose the turnaround that fits your schedule. Production times range from one to five business days, so your Advent banner arrives when you need it.

1 Business Day Priority

When timelines are tight, the one-day priority turnaround ensures your Advent banner is produced quickly.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express

Have an extra day but still need your Advent banner quickly? The express option is ideal.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard

The most popular turnaround option. Fast and included at no additional charge for most custom Advent banner orders.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver

Planning ahead for Advent season? Save on production costs by choosing the 5-day saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes may be available. Contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Advent Banner Orders

All Advent banners must be paid for prior to entering production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order enters production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping & Delivery Options for Advent Banners

If you have any questions about shipping your Advent banner, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your order. Unless otherwise specified, orders ship via UPS Ground. We offer 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. Banner costs will not be refunded if UPS or any other shipping company causes a delay. Delays due to natural disasters or circumstances beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds.

If a product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and a replacement product will be sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss, which generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Facility Locations

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners: Produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners: Produced in our Minnesota facility only.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, add additional postal information such as a P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Economy shipping can add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Popular Uses for Custom Advent Banners

Advent banners are a meaningful way to prepare your congregation and community for the Christmas season. Here are some of the most popular ways churches and organizations use custom Advent banners.

Church Sanctuary & Worship Displays

  • Advent wreath and candle-themed banners for the sanctuary
  • Peace, Hope, Love, and Joy banners for each week of Advent
  • Altar and stage backdrop banners for Advent services

Outdoor Church Signage

  • Roadside banners inviting the community to Advent services
  • Building-mounted banners announcing Advent schedules
  • Entrance and parking lot directional banners

Church Events & Programs

  • Advent concert and cantata promotions
  • Children's Advent program signage
  • Advent devotional and small group event banners

Community & Seasonal Celebrations

  • Community tree lighting ceremony banners
  • Charity and giving drive displays during Advent
  • Holiday market and bazaar signage

Schools & Educational Settings

  • Christian school Advent assembly banners
  • Classroom and hallway Advent decorations
  • School chapel and service project displays
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Advent Banner Printing

File Format Guidelines

The best file format for Advent banner printing is .eps converted to outline. We also accept high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure about the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be happy to assist you.

Artwork & Order Proofs

Requesting an order proof allows you to double-check your Advent banner for correct information before it goes into production. Your proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), along with your billing and shipping information. If you request a proof, your order will not enter production until you send your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your Advent banner project requires precise color matching — for example, matching your church's brand colors — we recommend using our Color Match Proof System. This is the most reliable way to ensure accurate color reproduction. Contact a customer service representative for more details.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Advent Banners for Your Church Today

Make this Advent season unforgettable with a professionally printed, full-color custom Advent banner from Banners.com. Whether you need a large outdoor banner to welcome your community to Advent services or elegant indoor banners displaying Peace, Hope, Love, and Joy throughout your sanctuary, we deliver high-quality results you can count on.

Advent banners are printed on durable 13 oz scrim vinyl rated for both indoor and outdoor use. With unlimited design options, dozens of Advent-themed templates, and sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', you have complete control over your banner's look and message. Choose your production time, upload your artwork or customize a template in our online designer, and we will handle the rest.

At Banners.com, we combine high-resolution, full-color printing with fast turnaround times and reliable shipping. Request a custom quote or start designing your Advent banner today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Advent Banners

What material are Advent banners printed on?

Advent banners are printed on 13 oz scrim vinyl as the standard material. You can also choose from 13 oz gloss vinyl, 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl, mesh, fabric, or adhesive vinyl depending on your display needs.

Can Advent banners be used outdoors?

Yes. Our vinyl Advent banners are rated for both indoor and outdoor use. For outdoor installations in windy areas, consider our mesh material option, which allows 37% airflow for added wind resistance.

What sizes are available for Advent banners?

Advent banners are available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'. If you need a larger or custom size, visit our oversized banners page or request a custom quote.

Do you offer Advent banner design templates?

Yes. We offer a variety of Advent-themed templates that you can customize in our online designer. You can also upload your own artwork file or have one of our professional graphic designers create a custom design for you.

How quickly can I receive my Advent banner?

Production times range from 1 to 5 business days. Combined with UPS Ground shipping (1–3 days to 90% of the U.S.), most orders arrive within one week. Expedited shipping options are also available.

What finishing options are available for Advent banners?

Finishing options include heat-welded hems with grommets, pole pockets (2", 3", or 4"), reinforced corners, and reinforced hems. Pole pockets are ideal for hanging Advent banners from dowels inside your church.

Can I order a double-sided Advent banner?

Yes. Double-sided finishing is available for Advent banners up to 150 square feet. For larger double-sided banners, contact us for a custom quote.

What file formats do you accept for Advent banner artwork?

We accept .eps (converted to outline), high-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files. Files should be 300 dpi or higher for the best print quality. If you are unsure about your file, our graphic designers will review it and contact you if adjustments are needed.

What payment methods are accepted?

We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, and checks. Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your order.

Do you ship Advent banners internationally?

Yes. For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Shipping Notice for Large Vinyl Advertising Banners

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your next event with an eye-catching custom advertising banner. From trade shows and in-store displays to grand openings, seasonal sales, and outdoor promotions, our professionally designed advertising banners help you improve visibility and make an unforgettable first impression.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an advertising banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating with you to ensure your advertising banner meets your exact specifications. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom advertising banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your advertising banner is delivered when you need it. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

If we didn't answer all your questions, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request. Submit a custom quote request for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity advertising banner orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl & Mesh Material Options for Advertising Banner Durability

Your advertising banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All advertising banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of advertising banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your advertising banner needs to be precise, please contact a customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Advertising Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular option for advertising banners. It has a low shine and rich color gamut, making it ideal for business signage and promotional displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Advertising Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics, giving your advertising banner a polished, high-end look.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl Advertising Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest option for advertising banners. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality — perfect for long-term outdoor advertising.

Mesh Advertising Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh advertising banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions, such as fence-mounted or building-wrap applications.

Fabric Advertising Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor advertising displays like trade shows and retail environments, with a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Advertising Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces — ideal for challenging advertising banner applications.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Advertising Banner Installation

Heat-Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all advertising banners to increase durability. These are a one-inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2-4 feet.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your advertising banner:

Top and Bottom Only Hems - Standard finishing option for vinyl advertising banners.

All Four Sides Hems - All 4 sides of the advertising banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets for Advertising Banner Display

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the advertising banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your advertising banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for Advertising Banners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the advertising banner. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners.

Reinforced Hems for Heavy-Duty Advertising Banners

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the advertising banner. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Advertising Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided advertising banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in advertising banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Shipping Options for Advertising Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping your advertising banner, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your advertising banner will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your advertising banner has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large advertising banner orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement advertising banner will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping for Advertising Banner Orders

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Frequently Asked Questions About Advertising Banners

What materials are your advertising banners made from?

We offer three vinyl banner materials: 13-oz. premium matte, 13-oz. premium glossy, and 18-oz. extra heavy-duty matte vinyl. We also provide wind-friendly mesh advertising banners and colorful fabric advertising banners for indoor displays.

What sizes can I get my advertising banners in?

Our advertising banners are available in a wide range of sizes. If you require a large vinyl banner, our 13-oz. banners can be printed seamlessly up to 16' x 50', while our 18-oz. vinyl advertising banners have a max print width of 8' x 50'.

What is the best way to hang my advertising banner?

We strongly recommend using and ordering ball bungees with your grommeted advertising banner. The bungees are designed to securely hang advertising banners in both indoor and outdoor settings.

For more information, check out our "How to install a vinyl banner with ball bungees" video.

Can you reuse advertising banners?

Yes, just make sure you are storing your advertising banner properly. When your banner is not being used, roll the advertising banner up with the printed side out to protect the inks.

To prevent the banner from bending, keep it in the box it was shipped in and store it away from extreme heat. Avoid windows or other direct sunlight.

Can I use my advertising banner outdoors?

Yes you can! Both vinyl and mesh advertising banners are suitable for outdoor use. If you are looking for something to last longer, we suggest our 18 oz. heavy-duty material for the most longevity.

How do I choose the right advertising banner for my business?

The right advertising banner depends on where you will use it. For example, if it's an outdoor promotion, our 13 and 18 oz. vinyl options are most optimal, as they are the heaviest-duty material we have. Alternatively, for indoor events, fabric advertising banners are better suited, as the fabric material allows for a brighter "pop" to the colors.

What can I use my advertising banner for?

  • Grand openings
  • Holiday promotions
  • Sales and clearance events
  • Welcome signs
  • Trade shows and expos
  • Festivals
  • Fundraisers
  • Sport events
  • Concerts

How do I store my advertising banner when not in use?

When not in use, roll your advertising banner with the printed side out to protect the inks. Keep it in the box it was shipped in to prevent bending and store it away from extreme heat or direct sunlight.

Can I upload my own artwork for my advertising banner?

Absolutely! You can upload your files to get started on your advertising banner order. Alternatively, use our easy-to-use online design tool to create your advertising banner from scratch.

Order Custom Yard Signs for Business & Event Promotion

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they're lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They're also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

Here at Banners.com, we want to make designing and displaying your yard sign easy. That's why we offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign.

Corrugated Plastic Material for Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Displays

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.)

The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.

Yard Sign Finishing & Installation Options

The following finishing options are available:

  • 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)
  • Single or double sided signs
  • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White.

Large Yard Sign Scoring for Shipping

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Promotional Displays

Custom yard signs are printed on 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), a durable and lightweight material designed specifically for outdoor advertising applications. This weather-resistant material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, running horizontally across standard 4' x 8' sheets.

The corrugated plastic material offers excellent durability for outdoor use while remaining lightweight for easy installation and transport. The waterproof properties make it ideal for extended outdoor display, whether for business promotion, real estate advertising, or event signage.

Available in both single-sided and double-sided printing options, this material accepts full-color digital printing with excellent color reproduction and clarity for professional advertising results.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Yard Sign Installation

Professional finishing options are available to enhance your yard sign's appearance and installation capabilities:

Print Finishing

  • White Margin: 1/2" white border around printed design
  • Full Bleed: Ink coverage extends to the edge of the sign for maximum visual impact

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided: Design printed on front face only
  • Double-Sided: Design printed on both front and back faces for maximum visibility

Installation Hardware

Yard sign accessories available for secure outdoor installation:

  • H Stakes in multiple sizes: 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30
  • Heavy-duty Beefy Stakes for enhanced stability
  • 12-inch Black Zip Ties for secure mounting
  • 36-inch White Zip Ties for larger installations
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges to accommodate your promotional timeline needs. Our production times range from one to five business days, allowing you to control when your yard signs are completed.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative for more information
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from file upload completion. If flagged in prepress or proof requested, turnaround starts from approval

2 Business Days Express Production

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from file upload completion

3 Business Days Standard Production

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from file upload completion

5 Business Days Saver Production

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from file upload completion

Payment Methods for Custom Yard Sign Orders

All yard signs must be paid for prior to being put into production to ensure timely processing of your order.

Accepted Payment Methods

We accept the following payment options:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)

Payment Processing

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order and artwork. This ensures you have complete control over your yard sign specifications before payment is processed.

For check payments, orders will not enter production until payment is received and cleared. Learn more about check order processing on our blog.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Yard Sign Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground with 1–3 day delivery to 90% of the United States.

Shipping Guidelines

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

Shipping Coverage Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners
This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners
This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

International Shipping

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Outdoor Advertising & Promotional Uses for Custom Yard Signs

Yard signs are a simple yet surprisingly powerful tool to put your message front and center throughout everyday spaces. These versatile promotional displays offer big impact without the high cost associated with other advertising methods.

Business & Commercial Applications

  • Real estate property advertising and open house promotion
  • Retail store sales and promotional announcements
  • Grand opening and new location announcements
  • Seasonal sales and special events
  • Construction site identification and safety messaging
  • Professional service advertising (landscaping, contracting, etc.)

Political & Campaign Uses

  • Local election campaigns and candidate promotion
  • Issue advocacy and ballot measure support
  • Political rally and event announcements
  • Voter registration drives

Personal & Community Events

  • Garage sale and estate sale advertising
  • Birthday and graduation celebrations
  • Sports team support and school spirit
  • Community events and fundraisers
  • Directional signage for events
  • Welcome home celebrations

These signs are super lightweight while being easy to set up, and with full CMYK color printing, they'll be catching the eyes of drivers, neighbors, and locals alike. From spotlighting seasonal deals to cheering on your favorite sports team, custom yard signs offer a creative yet unique way to share your message with the world.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Yard Sign Printing

File Format Requirements

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

File Size & Resolution

  • Maximum file size: 60 MB
  • Recommended resolution: 300 dpi or higher for optimal print quality
  • For files larger than 60 MB, please call for instructions to ensure fastest service

Acceptable File Formats

  • .eps (preferred - converted to outline)
  • .pdf (high resolution)
  • .tiff (high resolution)
  • .jpg (high resolution)

Artwork Proofing Options

Order Proofs: If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System: If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Design Assistance

Our professional graphic designers are available to help create your yard sign design. Simply select the "Professional Designer" option during ordering and provide specific instructions for your project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Customize & Order Your Yard Signs Today

Custom printed yard signs are a cost-effective way to advertise real estate events, new locations, sales and promotions. These signs are easy to transport, install and remove, making them perfect for any promotional campaign.

Get started with your yard sign order by choosing from three convenient design options:

  • Template Design: Customize from hundreds of professional templates online
  • Upload Your File: Submit your own print-ready artwork
  • Professional Design: Work with our graphic designers to create the perfect design

You can also design a custom business banner or flag banner to boost your visibility even more.

Ready to get started? Select your size, quantity, and design method above to begin creating your custom yard signs today!

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

Are yard signs effective for advertising?

When used in highly trafficked areas, yes! This type of signage is versatile and mobile making it great for both large marketing campaigns as well as small, local projects.

What are yard signs made from?

Your designs are printed on durable, yet lightweight 4 millimeter corrugated plastic. This material looks and feels like cardboard, but it is heartier and weather-resistant.

Are these signs waterproof?

Yes. The only element that could potentially do harm to your outdoor sign is gusty winds. This is because the signs are lightweight and physics.

Can I order a double-sided yard sign?

We can print single and double-sided signs.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Agriculture Yard Signs for Farm Business & Market Promotion

Custom agriculture yard signs are the perfect promotional tool for farms, agricultural businesses, and farmers market vendors. These lightweight, weatherproof corrugated plastic signs are designed to withstand outdoor conditions while delivering your farming message to passing traffic and potential customers.

Agriculture yard signs excel at promoting farm stands, seasonal produce sales, agricultural events, and farm business services. Their durability and full-color printing capabilities make them ideal for displaying product information, pricing, and business branding in agricultural settings.

All agriculture yard signs are printed on 4mm white corrugated plastic material with hollow flutes running horizontally. This material provides excellent durability while remaining lightweight and waterproof for extended outdoor display on farms and agricultural properties.

Agriculture Yard Sign Features

  • 4mm corrugated plastic construction for weather resistance
  • Full CMYK color printing for vibrant farm branding
  • Single or double-sided printing options
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and repositioning
  • Available with H-stakes for ground installation
  • Custom sizing options for various agricultural applications

Sizing Note: All corrugated agriculture yard signs are cut 1/8th inch smaller on each side for finishing (example: 18" x 24" signs ship as 17.75" x 23.75").

Large Sign Scoring: Signs over 32" x 48" or where height + width exceeds 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Contact customer service if flat shipping is required.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Farm Display

Agriculture yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), specifically chosen for agricultural environments and outdoor farm displays.

Corrugated Plastic Material Benefits

  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof construction withstands rain, snow, and agricultural irrigation
  • Durability: Hollow fluted design provides strength while maintaining lightweight portability
  • Print Quality: Smooth white surface accepts full-color digital printing for crisp farm branding
  • Chemical Resistance: Suitable for agricultural environments with fertilizers and pesticides
  • UV Stability: Maintains color integrity during extended sun exposure in farm fields

Material Construction

The 4mm corrugated plastic features hollow flutes running horizontally on standard 4' x 8' sheets. This fluted design creates a lightweight yet rigid structure perfect for agricultural yard sign applications.

Finishing Options Available

  • 1/2" white margin border or full bleed printing
  • Single-sided or double-sided printing
  • Compatible with H-stakes, beefy stakes, and zip tie mounting

The corrugated plastic material is specifically selected for agricultural use, providing the durability needed for farm environments while remaining cost-effective for seasonal promotions and events.

Print Finishing Options

  • White Margin: 1/2" white border provides clean, professional framing
  • Single-Sided: Cost-effective option for directional agricultural signage
  • Double-Sided: Maximum visibility from multiple directions on farm properties

Installation Hardware Options

  • H-Stakes: Available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" agriculture yard signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty ground installation for larger farm signs
  • 12" Black Zip Ties: Secure mounting to fencing and agricultural structures
  • 36" White Zip Ties: Extended reach for larger mounting applications

Large Sign Handling

Agriculture yard signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches receive automatic scoring and folding for efficient shipping. The scoring process cuts through the top layer without penetrating completely, allowing controlled folding while maintaining sign integrity.

Farm businesses requiring flat shipping for oversized agriculture yard signs can contact customer service for specialized shipping arrangements.

Agriculture Yard Sign Frequently Asked Questions

What material are agriculture yard signs made from?

Agriculture yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) with hollow flutes for lightweight durability. This weatherproof material is specifically chosen for agricultural environments and outdoor farm displays.

How long do agriculture yard signs last outdoors?

When properly installed, agriculture yard signs withstand multiple seasons of outdoor exposure. The corrugated plastic material resists rain, snow, UV rays, and agricultural chemicals commonly found in farming environments.

What sizes are available for agriculture yard signs?

Standard sizes range from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Custom sizing is available for specific agricultural applications. Signs over 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency.

Can I get double-sided agriculture yard signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for maximum visibility from multiple directions on farm properties. This option is popular for roadside farm stands and agricultural event promotion.

What installation hardware is available?

H-stakes are available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" signs. Beefy stakes accommodate larger agriculture yard signs. Zip ties in 12" and 36" lengths enable mounting to fencing and agricultural structures.

How should I prepare artwork for agriculture yard sign printing?

Submit high-resolution files (300 DPI or higher) in .EPS, .PDF, .TIFF, or .JPG format. Include high-contrast text for outdoor visibility and bold fonts readable from traffic distances.

What is the production time for agriculture yard signs?

Production times range from 1-5 business days depending on selected timeline. Express options accommodate urgent agricultural promotional needs, while economy production offers cost savings for advance planning.

Do you offer design services for agriculture yard signs?

Yes, professional graphic designers can create custom agriculture yard signs tailored to your farm business needs. Templates are also available for common agricultural applications.

How are large agriculture yard signs shipped?

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" are scored and folded for efficient shipping. Flat shipping is available for an additional cost when required for specific agricultural installations.

Can agriculture yard signs be used in organic farming operations?

Yes, our corrugated plastic material and printing inks are suitable for organic farming environments. The signs can promote organic certification and sustainable farming practices effectively.

Order Custom Reunion Banners for School Events & Celebrations

Make the most of your next school reunion with an eye-catching vinyl banner. From all-school reunions and class celebrations to alumni gatherings and anniversary events, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom reunion banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to hang. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made reunion banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom reunion banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your reunion celebration.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? We can provide custom sizing and specialty applications upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Reunion Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor School Events

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your reunion banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options for School Display Mounting

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Custom Reunion Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

2 Business Days Express:

Reunion Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping Options for Custom Reunion Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Reunion Banner Questions & Answers

What materials work best for outdoor school reunion events?

For outdoor school reunions, we recommend 13 oz vinyl or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for maximum durability. Mesh banners are also excellent for windy conditions as they allow 37% airflow.

How far in advance should I order my reunion banner?

We recommend ordering at least 2-3 weeks before your reunion event. However, we offer rush production options from 1-5 business days if you need your banner sooner.

Can you include multiple graduating class years on one reunion banner?

Yes! Our custom design options allow you to include multiple class years, school logos, and personalized messaging for all-school reunions.

What finishing options work best for gymnasium displays?

For indoor gymnasium displays, we recommend pole pockets or reinforced hems with grommets for easy hanging from existing mounting points.

Do you offer design services for school reunion banners?

Yes, our in-house graphic designers can create a custom reunion banner design for you. Simply provide your school information and reunion details when placing your order.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Create Custom Antique Store Banners for Retail & Storefront Advertising

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your antique store's visibility with eye-catching custom vinyl banners designed specifically for retail and storefront advertising. From grand openings and seasonal sales to daily promotions and special events, our professionally crafted antique store banners help improve your storefront visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with potential customers and collectors.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an antique store banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your retail advertising vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made antique store banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom antique store banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your antique store marketing campaigns.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your antique store banner project.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders for antique store chains.

Vinyl Banner Material for Professional Antique Store Displays

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your antique store banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your antique store branding. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your antique store banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material for antique store displays. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for professional storefront advertising.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your antique store banner a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for antique store outdoor displays. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor antique store advertising in windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor antique store displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for antique store window displays, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces for specialized antique store applications.

Professional Finishing Options for Antique Store Banner Installation

Antique Store Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for secure antique store banner mounting. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for long-term outdoor display. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners for professional antique store installations. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support in storefront banner displays.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all antique store banners to increase durability for storefront use.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your antique store banner:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the antique store banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your antique store banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the antique store banner for professional installation.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner for long-term antique store outdoor advertising.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided antique store banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Antique Store Banner Artwork Requirements for Quality Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best for antique store banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you with your antique store banner artwork.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your antique store banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your antique store banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Shipping Options for Custom Antique Store Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping your antique store banner, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your antique store banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large antique store banner orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the antique store banner product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)

  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

Economy Shipping

FAQ

What materials work best for outdoor antique store banners?

For outdoor antique store displays, we recommend our 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl or mesh banners for windy conditions. Both materials are weather-resistant and designed for long-term outdoor use.

Can I get custom sizes for my antique store banner?

Yes, we offer custom sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'. For larger sizes or unique dimensions, contact our customer service team for a custom quote.

How long will my antique store banner last outdoors?

Our vinyl banners are designed for outdoor durability. With proper installation and care, they can last 2-3 years outdoors, depending on weather conditions and material choice.

What file formats do you accept for antique store banner artwork?

We accept .eps (converted to outline), high-resolution .pdf, and .jpg files. Our graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for the best printing results.

Do you offer design services for antique store banners?

Yes, we have a team of professional graphic designers who can create custom antique store banners. Simply select "Let us Design" when placing your order and provide your requirements.

What finishing options work best for storefront banner installation?

For storefront installations, we recommend hems and grommets for easy hanging, or pole pockets if you plan to use a mounting system with poles or rods.

Custom Apartment Banner Material for Outdoor Property Marketing

Make the most of your property marketing with eye-catching custom apartment banners designed for outdoor durability and professional presentation. From apartment complex leasing campaigns to rental property advertising, our high-quality vinyl banners help property managers and real estate professionals attract potential tenants with professionally designed apartment banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver apartment banners that you're proud to display on your property. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of outdoor banner durability and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made apartment banner for your property marketing needs.

We offer a wide selection of custom apartment banner materials and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your apartment banner is delivered when you need it for your property marketing campaign.

Six Customizable Apartment Banner Materials

Your apartment banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that withstand outdoor weather conditions. All apartment banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Apartment Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl apartment banner material is our most popular choice for property marketing. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for outdoor apartment advertising.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Apartment Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl apartment banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your property marketing a high-end professional appearance.

18 oz Vinyl Apartment Banners
Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl apartment banner material is our toughest option for harsh outdoor conditions. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and superior print quality for long-term property advertising.

Mesh Apartment Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh apartment banners are ideal for windy outdoor property locations.

Fabric Apartment Banners
Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor property displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look for upscale apartment marketing.

Adhesive Apartment Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed for property advertising.
Extreme Tack Vinyl: High tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces for temporary apartment marketing campaigns.

Frequently Asked Questions About Apartment Banners

What size apartment banner works best for property marketing?

The ideal apartment banner size depends on your installation location and viewing distance. For apartment complex fence mounting, 3'x8' to 4'x12' apartment banners provide excellent visibility. For closer viewing at leasing offices, 2'x6' apartment banners work well. Our customer service team can recommend specific sizes based on your property marketing needs.

Which apartment banner material is best for outdoor property advertising?

For outdoor apartment marketing, we recommend 13 oz matte or gloss vinyl for standard conditions, or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for harsh weather environments. Mesh apartment banners work well in windy locations. All materials are weather-resistant and designed for extended outdoor property advertising.

How long do apartment banners last outdoors?

Quality apartment banners typically last 2-5 years outdoors depending on material choice, weather conditions, and installation location. 18 oz vinyl apartment banners offer the longest outdoor lifespan for property marketing applications, while mesh apartment banners provide excellent durability in high-wind conditions.

Can you help design my apartment marketing banner?

Yes! Our professional graphic designers can create custom apartment banners tailored to your property marketing needs. We can incorporate your property photos, branding, rental information, and contact details to create effective apartment advertising materials. Design services are available for all apartment banner orders.

Do you offer volume pricing for multiple apartment banners?

Absolutely. Property management companies and real estate professionals with multiple apartment marketing needs can receive volume pricing. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss pricing for large apartment banner orders or ongoing property marketing campaigns.

How should I install my apartment banner?

Apartment banner installation depends on your chosen finishing options. Grommeted apartment banners can be hung with bungee cords, zip ties, or banner rope. Pole pocket apartment banners slide onto mounting poles. We provide installation hardware recommendations with every apartment banner order.

Can apartment banners be double-sided?

Yes, we offer double-sided apartment banner printing up to 150 square feet. Double-sided apartment banners are perfect for property marketing where visibility is needed from multiple directions, such as apartment complex entrances or street-facing installations.

What information should I include on my apartment marketing banner?

Effective apartment banners typically include: property name, "For Rent" or "For Lease" messaging, contact phone number, key amenities, pricing information, and professional property photos. Our design team can help you create apartment banners that attract tenants and generate rental inquiries.
