Order Custom Apartment Yard Signs for Property Marketing & Vacancy Advertising

Custom apartment yard signs are essential marketing tools for property managers, leasing offices, and apartment complexes looking to attract tenants and promote available units. These professional corrugated plastic signs are perfect for displaying rental information, directing traffic to leasing offices, advertising open houses, and announcing new construction or renovations.

Our apartment yard signs are digitally printed in full color on durable 4mm white corrugated plastic material with hollow flutes running horizontally. This lightweight, waterproof material withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant colors and clear messaging for maximum visibility to potential tenants and visitors.

Available in single-sided or double-sided printing options, these versatile signs can accommodate various apartment marketing needs. From "Now Leasing" and "Apartments Available" messaging to directional signage and contact information, custom apartment yard signs provide cost-effective visibility for your property.

Key Features for Apartment Marketing:

  • Full-color digital printing on weather-resistant corrugated plastic
  • Single or double-sided printing options
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and repositioning
  • Available H-stakes and mounting accessories
  • Custom sizes from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96"
  • Professional finishing with white margins or full-bleed printing

Important Sizing Note: All corrugated plastic yard signs are trimmed 1/8" on each side during finishing (example: an 18" x 24" sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75"). For precision applications, please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

Large Sign Scoring: Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined height and width over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency. Contact us for flat shipping options if needed.

Apartment Yard Sign Materials for Outdoor Property Display

Our apartment yard signs are manufactured using premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), specifically chosen for its durability and performance in outdoor property marketing applications. This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, running horizontally across the sheet for optimal strength and weather resistance.

Corrugated Plastic Material Benefits:

  • Weather Resistant: Waterproof construction withstands rain, snow, and outdoor exposure
  • Lightweight: Easy installation and repositioning for changing property needs
  • Durable: Maintains structural integrity in outdoor conditions
  • Print Compatible: Smooth surface accepts vibrant full-color digital printing
  • Cost-Effective: Affordable material for multiple sign applications

Material Specifications:

  • 4mm thickness corrugated plastic substrate
  • White base material for optimal print quality
  • Horizontal flute direction for strength
  • Suitable for temperatures from -40°F to 180°F
  • Chemical resistant and fade-resistant

This material combination makes apartment yard signs ideal for extended outdoor display while maintaining professional appearance and readability essential for effective property marketing.

Installation Accessories Available:

  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty mounting for larger signs or high-wind areas

  • 36" White Zip Ties: Extended length for larger mounting applications

Large Sign Handling:

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. Scoring cuts through the top layer only, allowing the sign to fold without compromising the printed surface. This process ensures safe delivery while maintaining sign integrity.

For applications requiring flat delivery of large signs, our oversized flat shipping service is available. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 to discuss specific requirements and pricing.

Frequently Asked Questions About Apartment Yard Signs

What sizes are available for apartment yard signs?

We offer apartment yard signs in sizes ranging from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Popular sizes for apartment marketing include 18" x 24", 24" x 36", and 24" x 48". Custom sizes are also available for specific property needs.

How long do apartment yard signs last outdoors?

Our corrugated plastic apartment signs are designed for extended outdoor use. The waterproof material and fade-resistant inks typically maintain quality for 6-12 months of continuous outdoor exposure, depending on weather conditions.

Can I order different apartment signs with unique designs?

Yes, each unique design is treated as a separate sign order with individual pricing. This allows property managers to create specific messaging for different units, amenities, or promotional offers.

What installation options are available for apartment signs?

We offer H-stakes in multiple sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty Beefy Stakes for windy conditions, and zip ties in 12" and 36" lengths for fence or post mounting.

Do large apartment signs get folded for shipping?

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. This process doesn't damage the printed surface but allows compact delivery. Flat shipping is available for an additional fee.

Can apartment signs be printed on both sides?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for all apartment yard sign sizes. This option maximizes visibility from multiple directions and is ideal for corner locations or high-traffic areas.

What production time should I choose for urgent apartment marketing?

For immediate needs, choose 1-day Priority production. For weekend open houses or time-sensitive campaigns, 2-day Express provides fast turnaround. Standard 3-day production works well for planned marketing campaigns.

Are apartment yard signs suitable for all weather conditions?

Yes, our corrugated plastic material is waterproof and designed to withstand rain, snow, wind, and temperature variations from -40°F to 180°F, making them ideal for year-round apartment marketing.

Can I get a proof before my apartment signs are printed?

Yes, order proofs are available and include a low-resolution preview of your design along with complete order details. Production is paused until you approve the proof to ensure satisfaction with your apartment signage.

What file format works best for apartment sign artwork?

EPS files converted to outline provide the best print quality. We also accept high-resolution PDF, TIFF, and JPG files at 300 DPI or higher for optimal results on apartment yard signs.

From community tree planting events and Earth Day festivals to Arbor Day 5K races and environmental fundraisers, we help you create visibility for your cause with professionally designed Arbor Day banners that withstand outdoor weather conditions.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an Arbor Day banner that you're proud to display at your environmental event. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your eco-friendly vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of outdoor banner printing and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made Arbor Day banner that promotes your environmental message effectively.

We offer a wide selection of custom Arbor Day banners and environmental signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your Arbor Day banner is delivered when you need it for your tree planting event. PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Material for Weather-Resistant Arbor Day Displays

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your Arbor Day banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your environmental message. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your Arbor Day banner needs to be precise for specific display requirements, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material for Arbor Day events. It has a low shine and rich color gamut that makes environmental graphics and tree imagery stand out beautifully.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics perfect for eye-catching Arbor Day messaging.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for long-term outdoor Arbor Day displays. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and superior print quality in all weather conditions.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh Arbor Day banners are ideal for windy outdoor tree planting events and construction sites.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor Arbor Day presentations and environmental education displays with a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Finishing Options for Outdoor Arbor Day Banner Installation

Arbor Day Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for secure outdoor mounting. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for long-term outdoor display. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners where stress occurs during outdoor installation. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support during tree planting events.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all outdoor Arbor Day banners to increase durability against weather and wind.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for Arbor Day banners displayed between trees or posts.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability during outdoor environmental events.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of your Arbor Day banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your Arbor Day banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for outdoor Arbor Day displays and are grommeted to each corner of the banner for secure installation.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner for extended outdoor use during tree planting seasons.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided Arbor Day banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Arbor Day Banner Questions & Answers

What materials work best for outdoor Arbor Day events?

For outdoor tree planting events and Arbor Day celebrations, we recommend our 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials for durability, or mesh banners for windy conditions. All materials are weather-resistant and designed to withstand outdoor environmental conditions.

Can I use Arbor Day banner templates or upload my own design?

Yes! You can browse our collection of Arbor Day banner templates, upload your own print-ready environmental design, or work with our professional designers to create a custom Arbor Day banner that matches your event branding.

How quickly can I get my Arbor Day banner for my tree planting event?

We offer production times from 1-5 business days, depending on your needs. If you have an urgent Arbor Day celebration, our 1-day priority option ensures your banner is ready quickly.

What sizes are available for Arbor Day banners?

We offer Arbor Day banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50', with custom sizing available for larger environmental events. Contact us for oversized banner requirements for major tree planting ceremonies.

Are your Arbor Day banners environmentally friendly?

Our banners are manufactured in the USA using high-quality materials designed for durability and longevity, reducing the need for frequent replacements. We also offer fabric options for indoor environmental displays.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular athletic banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for indoor gymnasium displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your athletic banners a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality for long-lasting athletic displays.

Mesh Athletic Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor stadium and windy conditions.

Fabric Athletic Banners
Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor gymnasium displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Athletic Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.
Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Your athletic department banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant team colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality for long-lasting athletic displays.

Mesh Athletic Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor stadium installations and windy conditions.

Adhesive Athletic Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Athletic Banner Finishing Options for Gymnasium Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl athletic banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all athletic banners to increase durability for gymnasium installations.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your athletic department banners:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for athletic banners.
All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets for Athletic Banner Installation

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the athletic banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your athletic banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for Athletic Banners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner for long-lasting gymnasium displays.

Reinforced Hems for Athletic Banner Durability

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the athletic banner for championship recognition displays.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Athletic Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided athletic banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Athletic Banner Frequently Asked Questions

What materials work best for indoor athletic banners?

For indoor gymnasium displays, we recommend 13 oz matte vinyl or fabric athletic banners. Both materials provide excellent color reproduction for team logos and championship text while maintaining durability for long-term display.

How long do athletic banners last in indoor gymnasiums?

When properly installed indoors, vinyl athletic banners can last 10+ years without fading. Fabric banners also provide excellent longevity for indoor championship displays with proper care.

What sizes are available for athletic department banners?

We offer athletic banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger championship banners or custom dimensions, contact us for a custom quote.

Can you match specific team colors on athletic banners?

Yes! We offer a Color Match Proof System to ensure your athletic banners perfectly match your team's official colors. This is especially important for championship banners and official athletic department displays.

What finishing options work best for gymnasium installation?

For athletic banners hung in gymnasiums, we recommend pole pockets for clean installation or reinforced hems with grommets for maximum durability. The choice depends on your specific mounting system.

How quickly can you produce athletic banners for urgent events?

We offer 1-day priority production for urgent athletic banner needs, perfect for last-minute championship celebrations or unexpected tournament qualifications.

Do you offer double-sided athletic banners?

Yes, we can produce double-sided athletic banners up to 150 square feet. This is ideal for banners that will be viewed from both sides in gymnasiums or outdoor stadiums.

What file formats do you accept for athletic banner artwork?

We accept .eps (preferred), high-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files for athletic banners. Our graphic design team can help optimize your team logos and championship artwork for best printing results.

Our most popular material featuring low-glare matte finish that remains readable in all lighting conditions. Ideal for outdoor auction sale advertising with excellent color reproduction and weather resistance.

High-shine finish that produces exceptionally vibrant colors and sharp graphics for maximum visual impact. Perfect for auction sale banners requiring premium appearance and eye-catching appeal.

Premium nylon/polyester blend material with elegant appearance for indoor auction displays, preview events, and upscale estate sale marketing.

Auction Sale Banner Questions & Expert Support

What banner size works best for auction sale advertising?
Popular sizes for auction sales include 3'x8' and 4'x8' banners for roadside placement, 2'x6' banners for property mounting, and larger 4'x10' or 5'x10' banners for high-traffic intersections. Consider viewing distance and mounting location when selecting size.

Can auction sale banners withstand outdoor weather conditions?
Yes, our 13 oz and 18 oz vinyl materials are designed for extended outdoor exposure. Heat-welded hems and reinforced corners provide additional durability for wind resistance and repeated handling during setup.

How far in advance should I order my auction sale banner?
We recommend ordering 1-2 weeks before your event for standard production, though we offer 1-day priority production for last-minute auction announcements. Consider shipping time to your location when planning.

What information should be included on an auction sale banner?
Essential elements include auction date and time, location address or landmarks, preview/inspection times, contact phone number, and auctioneer information. Keep text large enough to read from vehicle traffic.

Do you offer design services for auction sale banners?
Yes, our in-house graphic designers can create professional auction banners using your event details. Design services include layout, color selection, typography, and optimization for roadside visibility.

Can I get banners for multiple auction dates?
Absolutely. We offer volume pricing for multiple banners and can create templates for recurring auction events. Contact customer service for multi-banner orders and custom quotes.

What's the best mounting method for auction sale banners?
Grommets with zip ties or bungee cords work well for fence mounting. Pole pockets are ideal for banner stands. Reinforced corners recommended for high-wind areas or temporary installations.

If you have questions about auction sale banners, please contact us at (320) 391-5300 and our customer service representatives will be happy to assist you.

Custom Authorized Dealer Banners for Business Credibility & Brand Recognition

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Build customer trust and showcase your authorized dealer status with professionally designed custom vinyl banners. Perfect for automotive dealerships, equipment retailers, appliance stores, and any business selling branded products, these banners establish credibility and increase foot traffic through clear brand recognition displays.

At Banners.com, we specialize in creating authorized dealer banners that meet professional business standards. Our experienced team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who understand the importance of accurate brand representation. Through strict quality checks and close collaboration, we ensure your authorized dealer banner reflects your business professionally.

We offer comprehensive customization options including sizes from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design possibilities through our online designer, and flexible production times to meet your business timeline. Whether you need indoor retail displays or outdoor storefront advertising, our authorized dealer banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art equipment.

Professional Brand Recognition
Display manufacturer logos, authorized dealer credentials, and business information with vibrant, professional-quality printing that builds customer confidence in your authorized dealer status.

Durable Business Signage
Constructed with premium vinyl materials designed for both indoor retail environments and outdoor storefront installations, ensuring long-lasting brand visibility.

Custom Business Solutions
Accommodate specific brand guidelines, multiple manufacturer partnerships, and unique business requirements through our custom design and production capabilities.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Authorized Dealer Banner Materials for Indoor & Outdoor Business Use

Your authorized dealer banner is manufactured with premium materials and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant brand colors that meet professional standards. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please contact customer service to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular choice for authorized dealer displays. Features low shine and rich color reproduction ideal for professional business environments.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

High-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material with high shine that produces vibrant, crisp brand colors and graphics for premium authorized dealer presentations.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material provides maximum durability for outdoor authorized dealer displays. Features low luster, blockout coating for enhanced print quality and weather resistance.

Mesh Banners

Constructed with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material featuring criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Ideal for outdoor authorized dealer displays in windy conditions and fence installations.

Fabric Banners

Premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material perfect for indoor authorized dealer displays. Low shine finish produces professional appearance ideal for retail showrooms and trade show environments.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Suitable for indoor and outdoor applications, with 3-5 year outdoor lifespan when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: White calendered vinyl with high tack adhesive designed for low energy surfaces and challenging installation environments.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing Options for Authorized Dealer Banner Installation

Professional finishing ensures your authorized dealer banner installs properly and maintains appearance throughout its display life.

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
One inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically placed every 2–4 feet for secure mounting. Thick, weblike material heat-welded to perimeter providing additional reinforcement for high-traffic installations. Triangular vinyl pieces applied to corners for improved strength and durability in challenging conditions. Sleeve construction allowing dowel or pole insertion for professional display systems.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch vinyl banner material folded and heated together forming strong, durable edges. We recommend hems for all authorized dealer banners to increase longevity.

Top and Bottom Only Hems: Standard finishing for most authorized dealer banner installations.

All Four Sides Hems: Complete perimeter heat welding and grommeting for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around designated banner edges.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – accommodates poles 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – accommodates poles 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – accommodates poles 1 1/2" in diameter

Selecting pole pockets does not increase finished banner dimensions. Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide enhanced strength with grommets applied to each banner corner for secure mounting in challenging conditions.

Reinforced Hems

PVC-coated webbing increases banner strength for demanding installation environments. Reinforced hems cannot be combined with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

Double-sided authorized dealer banners available up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require custom consultation.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Shipping Options for Authorized Dealer Banner Delivery

If you have questions about shipping your authorized dealer banner, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your order. Unless otherwise specified, orders ship via UPS Ground with 1–3 day delivery to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your authorized dealer banner has shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by package weight and destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large authorized dealer banner orders.

Shipping Terms & Conditions

After shipment, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund banner costs for shipping company delays beyond our control.

Delays due to natural disasters or circumstances beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If your authorized dealer banner is damaged during shipping, damaged goods must be returned before replacement product is sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after shipping company confirms loss, typically taking 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping

For international authorized dealer banner shipments, customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only.

Production Facilities

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners: Produced in Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities based on customer location and product specifications for optimal delivery.

Fabric Banners: Produced exclusively in our Minnesota facility.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

When selecting economy shipping, include additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field during checkout to ensure successful delivery. Economy shipping may add 5–10 additional days depending on destination.

Authorized Dealer Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Professional artwork ensures your authorized dealer banner prints with sharp brand logos and clear text that meets business standards.

Preferred File Formats

The optimal file format for authorized dealer banners is .eps converted to outlined text. We also accept high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you're unsure about file quality, our professional graphic designers will review and assist with optimization.

Artwork/Order Proofs

Requesting an order proof allows you to verify all information before production begins. Your proof includes:

  • Low-resolution image of your authorized dealer banner artwork
  • Complete order summary including pricing
  • Billing and shipping information verification

Important: If you request a proof, production will not begin until you send approval confirmation.

Color Match Proof System

For color-critical authorized dealer banners requiring precise brand color matching, we recommend our Color Match Proof System. This ensures accurate color reproduction for your specific project requirements. Contact customer service for detailed information about color matching services.

Brand Guidelines Compliance

When creating authorized dealer banners, ensure your artwork complies with manufacturer brand guidelines including:

  • Approved logo usage and sizing
  • Required legal text and disclaimers
  • Brand color specifications
  • Authorized dealer designation requirements

Design Assistance

Our in-house graphic design team can assist with authorized dealer banner creation, ensuring professional appearance and brand guideline compliance while maximizing visual impact for your business.

FAQ - Authorized Dealer Banner Questions & Answers

What sizes are available for authorized dealer banners?

We offer authorized dealer banners from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger sizes, we provide oversized banner options with custom freight shipping.

Which material works best for outdoor authorized dealer displays?

For outdoor use, we recommend 18 oz vinyl for maximum durability or mesh banners for windy conditions. Both materials provide weather resistance suitable for long-term outdoor display.

Can you help ensure my banner meets manufacturer brand guidelines?

Yes, our graphic design team can review manufacturer brand guidelines and assist with compliant authorized dealer banner design, including proper logo usage and required legal text.

How long do authorized dealer banners last outdoors?

With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl authorized dealer banners typically last 2-4 years outdoors, depending on climate conditions and material selection.

Do you offer double-sided authorized dealer banners?

Yes, we can produce double-sided authorized dealer banners up to 150 square feet. Larger double-sided banners require custom consultation.

What's the difference between reinforced hems and standard hems?

Reinforced hems include PVC-coated webbing for additional strength, recommended for high-traffic areas or challenging installation conditions. Standard hems work well for most indoor and protected outdoor applications.

Can I get a proof before my authorized dealer banner goes to production?

Yes, we offer order proofs that show your artwork and verify all order details. Color match proofs are also available for color-critical applications requiring precise brand color matching.

What file format should I submit for best print quality?

The optimal format is .eps with outlined text. We also accept high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files. Our design team will review your files and contact you if any adjustments are needed.

Do you ship authorized dealer banners internationally?

Yes, we ship internationally. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

What if I need my authorized dealer banner folded for shipping?

Banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for standard shipping. If you prefer your banner not folded, contact us for custom freight shipping options.

Order Custom Automotive Banners for Car Dealerships & Service Centers

Make the most of your automotive promotions with eye-catching vinyl banners designed specifically for car dealerships, service centers, and automotive businesses. From seasonal sales events and new car launches to service specials and grand openings, custom automotive banners help you attract customers and boost visibility for your automotive business.

Here at Banners.com, we specialize in creating durable automotive banners that withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant colors and professional appearance. Our automotive banners are perfect for car lot installations, storefront displays, service bay promotions, and special automotive events.

We offer automotive banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50' with unlimited design customization options through our online designer. Choose from multiple production times to ensure your automotive banner arrives when you need it for your car sales event or service promotion.

All automotive banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers to your automotive business. Our experienced team includes graphic designers and production experts who understand the automotive industry's unique marketing needs.

Popular Automotive Banner Applications:

  • New car sales events and promotions
  • Oil change and service specials
  • Car wash and detailing services

Automotive Banner Material for Outdoor Car Lot Installation

Your automotive banner is manufactured with premium materials designed to withstand outdoor car lot conditions while maintaining professional appearance. All automotive banners are printed using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers to your dealership.

Material Size Variance: Vinyl is temperature-sensitive, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing and outdoor climate exposure. Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For precision automotive installations, contact customer service.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Automotive Banners

Our most popular automotive banner material features high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl with low shine and rich color reproduction, ideal for professional automotive business displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Automotive Banners

Premium gloss vinyl material with high shine produces vibrant, crisp automotive graphics and promotional text for a premium dealership appearance.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Automotive Vinyl Banners

Extra heavy-duty matte vinyl with blockout coating provides maximum durability for long-term automotive lot installations and extreme weather conditions.

Mesh Automotive Banners

8 oz PVC polyester mesh material with 37% airflow prevents wind damage, making it perfect for outdoor automotive lot installations and windy car lot conditions.

Fabric Automotive Banners

Premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material creates an upscale appearance for indoor automotive showroom displays and dealership events.

Adhesive Automotive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Indoor and outdoor automotive applications with 3-5 year outdoor lifespan when properly installed.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: High-adhesion vinyl specifically designed for automotive surfaces and low-energy car lot materials.

Finishing Options for Automotive Banner Display & Mounting

Professional finishing options ensure your automotive banners install securely and maintain their appearance throughout car lot display and outdoor automotive use.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

One-inch heat-welded hems with grommets provide secure mounting for automotive lot installations. Available in top/bottom only or all four sides for complete automotive banner reinforcement.

Top and Bottom Hems: Standard automotive banner finishing for horizontal car lot displays.

All Four Sides Hems: Maximum reinforcement for automotive banners exposed to high winds.

Pole Pockets for Automotive Banner Display

Pole pockets create sleeves for dowel or pole installation at your automotive location:

  • 2" Pole Pockets: Fits 3/4" diameter poles for lightweight automotive displays
  • 3" Pole Pockets: Fits 1 1/4" diameter poles for standard automotive installations
  • 4" Pole Pockets: Fits 1 1/2" diameter poles for heavy-duty car lot mounting

Note: Pole pockets are not compatible with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Automotive Banner Construction

Reinforced Corners: Triangular vinyl reinforcements provide extra strength at automotive banner corners with additional grommets.

Reinforced Hems: PVC-coated webbing increases automotive banner strength for long-term car lot installations.

Double-Sided Automotive Banners

Double-sided automotive banners available up to 150 square feet for maximum car lot visibility. Larger automotive banner sizes require custom quotes.

Automotive Banner FAQ

What's the best material for outdoor automotive banners?

For car lot installations and outdoor automotive use, we recommend 13 oz vinyl (matte or gloss) or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for maximum durability. Mesh automotive banners work best in windy car lot conditions due to their 37% airflow design.

How long do automotive banners last outdoors?

High-quality vinyl automotive banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors with proper installation and normal weather exposure. Heavy-duty 18 oz material provides the longest lifespan for permanent car lot installations.

Can you match my dealership's brand colors exactly?

Yes! Our Color Match Proof System ensures precise automotive brand color reproduction. Contact customer service with your specific automotive brand color requirements (PMS, RGB, or CMYK values).

What size automotive banner works best for car lot visibility?

Popular automotive banner sizes include 3'x8', 4'x10', and 5'x15' for car lot fence installation. Larger sizes like 4'x20' or 6'x20' work well for building-mounted automotive displays. Size depends on your specific car lot layout and viewing distance.

Do you offer templates specifically for automotive businesses?

Yes! We have numerous automotive banner templates including designs for car sales, oil change services, tire promotions, grand openings, and more. Browse our automotive category in the template selector above.

How should I install automotive banners on my car lot fence?

For fence installation, choose hems and grommets finishing. Use zip ties, bungee cords, or banner clips to secure grommets to chain link fencing. Ensure banner is taut to prevent wind damage and maintain professional appearance.

Can automotive banners be double-sided for maximum visibility?

Yes, we create double-sided automotive banners up to 150 square feet. Double-sided banners are perfect for car lot corners or pole-mounted displays where the banner can be viewed from multiple directions.

What's the difference between automotive banner materials?

13 oz matte vinyl offers professional appearance with low glare, 13 oz gloss vinyl provides vibrant colors with high shine, 18 oz vinyl delivers maximum durability, mesh banners prevent wind damage, and fabric banners create upscale indoor showroom displays.

How fast can I get automotive banners for an urgent car sales event?

We offer 1-day priority production for urgent automotive banner needs. Combined with overnight shipping, you can receive automotive banners within 2-3 business days. Contact customer service for same-day emergency production availability.

Do you offer volume pricing for automotive dealer groups?

Yes! We provide special pricing for automotive dealer groups, chains, and large quantity orders. Contact us for a custom quote with volume automotive banner pricing and coordinated delivery to multiple dealership locations.

Custom Back to School Banner Design & Installation Solutions

Make the most of your next school event with an eye-catching custom back to school banner. From classroom displays and school entrance signage to welcome back celebrations and open house events, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom back to school banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to hang. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made back to school banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom back to school banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for the school year.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

Back to School Banner Materials for Indoor & Outdoor School Displays

Six Customizable Back to School Banner Materials

Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Back to School Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for school displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Back to School Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look for educational environments.

18 oz Vinyl Back to School Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality ideal for long-term school installations.

Mesh Back to School Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor school installations and windy conditions.

Fabric Back to School Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor school displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Back to School Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Back to School Banner Finishing Options for Professional Installation

Back to School Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets

These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet.

Reinforced Hems

A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement.

Reinforced Corners

A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners.

Pole Pockets

A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for back to school banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets for School Banner Installation

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for Enhanced Durability

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems for Professional Installation

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Back to School Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are back to school banners made of?

You have 5 options that you are able to choose from. If you choose vinyl, you are able to choose from our 13oz gloss vinyl or our 13-oz matte vinyl, or our heavy-duty 18-oz vinyl banner material. Our two other options include mesh or our fabric banner soft material.

If you are curious about the differences in these material types, we encourage you to order one of our FREE sample packets that will allow you to see, feel, and know the material that you are ordering.

Can my first day of school banner be double-sided?

Kind of, our double sided banners are available in 3 material choices – 13-oz. gloss vinyl, 13-oz. matte vinyl, and 18-oz. extra heavy duty vinyl. Mesh and fabric banners are currently only available single sided.

How should I properly store the back to school banner that I ordered?

When your banner is not in use, we recommend rolling up your banner to decrease any creasing or physical wear. We also recommend that you store your banner in a cool, dry place to avoid water damage to the material, as well as ensuring that it is out of any direct sunlight that could affect the artwork over time.

What is the largest size banner I can order?

For this product the largest banner we can print is 8' x 50'. Consider ordering an oversized banners if you need something larger.

How do I remove wrinkles from my welcome back to school banner?

The first and least hands-on approach is to simply unroll your banners and place them in the hot sun for a few hours and the wrinkles should come out.

The second option is more of a hands-on approach, and we recommend using a clothing steamer with a refillable water tank. Simply just use the steamer much like you would with a piece of clothing and this steamer should take the wrinkles right out!

For more information, check out our YouTube video on how to remove wrinkles from your banner.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a backdrop banner stand?

A backdrop banner stand is a portable and adjustable frame designed to hold and display large fabric or vinyl banners. It provides a sturdy structure to showcase banners in a vertical orientation, creating a visually appealing backdrop for various events, trade shows, conferences, photo shoots, or stage presentations.

What materials can my artwork be printed on?

Your backdrop banner stand graphics are printed on premium 9 oz stretch fabric material. This high-quality fabric provides excellent durability, vibrant color reproduction, and maintains a professional appearance through repeated use at trade shows and events.

Can I swap banners in the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, backdrop banner stands are designed to allow for easy swapping of banners. Simply remove the existing banner from the pole pockets and replace it with a new one. This versatility allows you to use the same backdrop stand hardware for different events or update your promotional messages and graphics as needed.

Do you offer different sizes for the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, we offer backdrop banner stands in two standard sizes: 8' x 8' and 8' x 10'. The adjustable slider frame can accommodate displays ranging from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height, providing flexibility for different venue requirements.

Can I order the Backdrop Banner Stand hardware separately?

Yes, you can order backdrop banner stand hardware separately. If you already have graphics but need the stand hardware, or if you require a replacement stand, ordering the hardware separately provides a convenient and cost-effective solution for your display needs.

Backdrop Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Event Use

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your backdrop banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All backdrop banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of backdrop banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your backdrop banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl backdrop banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl backdrop banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl backdrop banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Backdrop Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh backdrop banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Backdrop Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Backdrop Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Backdrop Banner Display

Backdrop Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the backdrop banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all backdrop banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for backdrop banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the backdrop banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the backdrop banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your backdrop banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the backdrop banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the backdrop banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Backdrop Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided backdrop banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in backdrop banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are backdrop banners?

Backdrop banners are large-format printed banners used as a photo background at events (often for red carpet or step-and-repeat style photos). They can be used alone or with a backdrop banner stand for display.

What materials are available for custom backdrop banners?

Backdrop banners are available in: 13 oz premium matte vinyl, 13 oz premium gloss vinyl, 18 oz extra heavy-duty matte vinyl, 8 oz PVC polyester mesh, and polyester fabric.

What are the most common backdrop banner sizes?

Two popular sizes are 8' × 8' (great for small group photos) and 8' × 20' (ideal for larger, red-carpet-style photo lines).

What sizes can I order for a custom backdrop banner?

Backdrop banners can be ordered from 1' × 1' up to 8' × 50'.

Do backdrop banners come with pole pockets?

Pole pockets are available as an add-on. Select pole pockets in the finishing options during checkout.

What pole pocket sizes are available, and what pole fits each?

2" pole pocket: fits ~3/4" diameter pole
3" pole pocket: fits ~1 1/4" diameter pole
4" pole pocket: fits ~1 1/2" diameter pole

What events are backdrop banners used for?

Common uses include trade shows, conferences, corporate events, grand openings, weddings, birthday parties, and red carpet/photo booth setups.

What other banner types do you offer besides backdrop banners?

We offer a range of custom banners and flags, including mesh banners, fabric banners, canvas banners, pole banners, step-and-repeat, and various specialty banners and custom flags.

How do I hang or install a backdrop banner?

Use all grommets to distribute tension evenly, and consider ball bungees for secure mounting and reduced stress on the banner.

How should I store a backdrop banner when it's not in use?

Roll it (don't fold it) with the printed side facing out, and store it in the original box/tube away from extreme heat and direct sunlight.

How do I remove wrinkles or creases from a backdrop banner?

Unroll it and let it relax; you can also place it in sunlight for a few hours or use a clothing steamer to smooth wrinkles. Watch our video for more information.

Frequently Asked Questions

What sizes are available for backdrop replacement banners?

Our backdrop replacement banners work with the adjustable slider frame system, accommodating display sizes from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height. The most popular size is 96"W x 94"H for the graphic area.

How long do backdrop banners take to produce?

Standard production time is 5 business days, with a 7 business day option available for cost savings. Rush production may be available - contact customer service for emergency timelines.

What material are backdrop replacement banners printed on?

We use premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material with dye-sublimation printing. This material is specifically designed for indoor trade show displays and provides vibrant colors with wrinkle-resistant properties.

Can I use my existing artwork for a backdrop banner?

Yes, we accept print-ready files in .eps, .pdf, or high-resolution .tiff/.jpg formats. Files should be 300 DPI minimum and under 60 MB for online upload.

Do backdrop banners come with the frame?

This product is for replacement banners only. If you need a complete backdrop display system including the slider frame, please contact customer service for frame and banner packages.

How are backdrop banners shipped?

Backdrop banners typically ship folded in protective packaging. We offer multiple shipping speeds from economy (5-10 days) to overnight delivery to meet your event timeline.

Can backdrop banners be used outdoors?

Our backdrop banners are designed for indoor trade show and event use. The stretch fabric material and slider frame system are optimized for indoor environments.

What if I need help with my backdrop banner design?

Our customer service team consists of professional graphic designers who can assist with design questions, artwork requirements, and custom design services.

Backdrop Banner Stand Hardware - Frequently Asked Questions

What are the maximum and minimum display sizes for this backdrop stand?

The telescopic frame adjusts from a minimum of 81" width x 41.5" height up to a maximum of 96" width x 96" height. The graphic area is slightly smaller at 96"W x 94"H to account for the pole pockets.

How much does the complete backdrop stand system weigh?

The entire system weighs 16 lbs including the telescopic frame, carry bag, and all hardware components. This lightweight design makes it easy to transport to trade shows and events.

What's included with my backdrop stand hardware order?

Your complete package includes the telescopic slider frame, your custom printed graphic with sewn pole pockets (top and bottom), a professional black nylon carry bag, and a 1-year warranty on the frame components.

Can I add side pole pockets for additional stability?

Yes, you can upgrade your order to include left and right side pole pockets in addition to the standard top and bottom pockets. This provides enhanced stability and a more finished appearance.

What material is the backdrop banner printed on?

We use premium stretch fabric with dye-sublimation printing for vibrant, long-lasting graphics. The material is wrinkle-resistant and machine-washable for easy maintenance.

How long does production take for backdrop stand orders?

We offer flexible production times including 5 business days standard and 7 business days saver pricing. Rush options may be available - contact customer service for urgent orders.

What are the shipping dimensions for this product?

The backdrop stand ships in a compact 41" x 5" x 4" package weighing 16 lbs total. This compact size keeps shipping costs reasonable and makes storage convenient.

Is assembly difficult for the telescopic backdrop stand?

No tools are required for assembly. The telescopic poles slide and lock into position, and the graphic slides onto the frame via the sewn pole pockets. Complete setup instructions are included with every order.

What file formats do you accept for backdrop graphics?

We accept PDF, AI, EPS, PSD, JPEG, and PNG files. Vector formats are preferred for best quality. All files should be in CMYK color mode at 300 DPI minimum resolution.

Does the backdrop stand work for outdoor events?

The stand is designed primarily for indoor use or covered outdoor areas. While the aluminum construction is durable, we recommend avoiding direct weather exposure to maintain the longevity of both the frame and fabric graphic.

Durable Bait & Tackle Banners for Marina and Outdoor Storefront Applications

Make the most of your next fishing season with eye-catching bait and tackle banners designed for marine environments. From marina storefronts and bait shops to fishing tournaments and outdoor retail displays, we can help you improve your visibility and attract more customers with professionally designed custom vinyl banners built to withstand marine conditions.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to display at your marina or bait shop. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years, deeply familiar with the marine retail industry requirements.

We offer a wide selection of custom bait and tackle banners including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and production time options to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for fishing season or your grand opening.

All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers from the water and parking areas. Your banner is made with marine-grade materials designed to withstand outdoor elements including sun, wind, and moisture exposure common in marina environments.

Bait & Tackle Banner Materials for Marine & Outdoor Retail Display

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular choice for bait and tackle shop displays. It has a low shine that reduces glare on water and delivers rich color reproduction for your fishing graphics and text.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material features a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors perfect for attracting attention from boaters and anglers. The glossy finish gives your bait shop signage a professional, high-end appearance.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest option for challenging marine environments. It features a low luster, blockout coating for superior durability against salt air, UV exposure, and weather conditions.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material featuring a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for windy marina locations and coastal areas where wind resistance is critical.

Fabric Banners

Made with premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material. This fabric option is ideal for indoor bait shop displays and trade shows, featuring a low shine that produces an upscale look for premium tackle presentations.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl can be applied to smooth marina surfaces and boat hulls, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained in marine environments.

Finishing Options for Bait & Tackle Banner Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of vinyl banner material folded over and heat-welded together to form a strong, weather-resistant hem. We recommend hems for all outdoor bait and tackle banners to increase durability in marine environments.

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for storefront bait and tackle banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides hemmed and grommeted for maximum durability in windy marina conditions.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner for easy pole mounting at marinas and fishing piers.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for banners exposed to marine winds and are grommeted to each corner for secure mounting.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems feature PVC-coated webbing which increases banner strength and longevity in outdoor marine applications.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided bait and tackle banners up to 150 square feet for maximum visibility from multiple angles at marinas and fishing tournaments.

Frequently Asked Questions About Bait & Tackle Banners

What banner material works best for outdoor marina use?

For outdoor marina applications, we recommend our 18 oz vinyl banners for maximum durability against marine elements, or mesh banners for windy coastal locations. Both materials are designed to withstand UV exposure, salt air, and moisture.

Can I get my bait and tackle banner in time for fishing season?

Yes! We offer production times from 1-5 business days, plus fast shipping options. Our 1-day priority production is perfect for last-minute needs, while our standard 3-day production works great for planned fishing season promotions.

Do you offer bait and tackle banner templates?

Yes, we have a variety of bait and tackle banner templates featuring fishing themes, marine graphics, and tackle shop designs. You can also upload your own design or work with our graphic designers for custom artwork.

What sizes are available for bait and tackle banners?

We offer sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50' for standard production. For larger marina displays, we can provide custom quotes for oversized banners through our custom quote system.

How do I hang my bait and tackle banner at my marina?

We offer several finishing options including grommets for rope or bungee cord installation, pole pockets for easy pole mounting, and reinforced corners for extra durability in windy conditions. Choose the option that best fits your marina setup.

Are your banners suitable for saltwater environments?

Yes, our marine-grade vinyl materials are designed to withstand saltwater exposure, UV rays, and coastal weather conditions. The 18 oz vinyl and mesh options are particularly well-suited for challenging marine environments.

Can I get a proof before my bait and tackle banner is printed?

Absolutely! You can request an order proof to review your design, colors, and order details before production begins. For color-critical projects, we also offer a Color Match Proof System for the most accurate color reproduction.

Do you ship internationally for fishing businesses overseas?

Yes, we offer international shipping for bait and tackle banners. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Bakery Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Restaurant Use

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your bakery banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your bakery banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Bakery Banner Finishing Options for Professional Display

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all bakery banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your bakery banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Frequently Asked Questions About Bakery Banners

What materials work best for outdoor bakery banners?

For outdoor bakery banner displays, we recommend 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials for maximum durability. Mesh banners are ideal for windy locations as they allow 37% airflow while maintaining vibrant graphics.

How long do bakery banners last outdoors?

Vinyl bakery banners typically last 2-5 years outdoors when properly installed and maintained. The lifespan depends on weather exposure, material thickness, and finishing options selected.

Can you match specific bakery brand colors?

Yes, we offer a Color Match Proof System for color-critical bakery banner projects. This ensures your brand colors are accurately reproduced on your custom bakery banners.

What sizes are available for bakery banners?

Bakery banners are available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger custom sizes, please contact us for a custom quote.

Do you offer same-day production for bakery banners?

We offer 1-business-day priority production for bakery banners. Same-day rushes may be available - please contact customer service for emergency orders.

What finishing options work best for storefront display?

For storefront bakery banner installation, we recommend hems with grommets for easy hanging, or pole pockets for clean pole mounting. Reinforced corners add extra durability for frequent handling.

Custom Bank Banner Materials for Financial Marketing Displays

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your financial marketing campaigns with professional vinyl bank banners designed for both indoor and outdoor display. From grand opening announcements and loan promotions to new account drives and seasonal banking offers, our custom printed bank banners help financial institutions increase visibility and attract new customers.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a bank banner that you're proud to display at your financial institution. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your banking marketing vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of financial marketing banners and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a professional bank banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom bank banners and financial signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your bank banner is delivered when you need it for your marketing campaign. Get started on your order today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.
