Frequently Asked Questions About Valentine's Day Flags

What is the lifespan of Valentine's Day flags?

With proper care and installation, custom Valentine's Day flags have an outdoor lifespan of 3-6 months. We recommend taking your Valentine's Day flag down during severe weather to help extend its lifespan and maintain vibrant colors throughout multiple Valentine's seasons.

Do Valentine's Day flags come with a warranty?

Yes, we offer prorated monthly warranty coverage for standard Valentine's Day flags. For example, a Valentine's Day flag that fails after 2 months of proper installation will receive 33% replacement cost coverage for a new flag.

Can I use the same design for multiple Valentine's Day flag sizes?

Absolutely. Your Valentine's Day flag artwork can be scaled to fit different flag sizes. Our design team will adjust proportions to ensure text remains readable and graphics appear balanced across various Valentine's Day flag dimensions.

Are Valentine's Day flags suitable for windy conditions?

Our Valentine's Day flags are constructed with durable polyester-nylon fabric that handles moderate wind conditions well. For extremely windy locations, consider reinforced finishing options and proper flag hardware rated for your local wind conditions.

How do I care for my Valentine's Day flag?

Store your Valentine's Day flag indoors when not in use. Clean gently with mild soap and water if needed. Avoid harsh chemicals that could damage the fabric or fade the romantic colors in your Valentine's Day design.

Can you match specific Valentine's Day colors?

Yes, our color matching system can help achieve specific Valentine's Day brand colors or design requirements. Contact customer service with your color specifications, and we'll work to match your desired romantic color palette.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom VBS Yard Signs for Church Promotion & Community Outreach

Custom VBS yard signs are the perfect promotional tool for churches looking to advertise their Vacation Bible School programs to the community. These lightweight, durable signs are designed for easy outdoor installation and deliver maximum visibility for passing cars and pedestrians.

Our custom VBS yard signs are digitally printed in full color on 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This weather-resistant material features hollow flutes that provide durability while keeping the signs lightweight and easy to handle. The corrugated plastic is waterproof and can withstand outdoor conditions throughout your VBS promotion period.

VBS Yard Sign Features

  • Full-color digital printing for vibrant VBS designs
  • 4mm corrugated plastic construction for durability
  • Waterproof and weather-resistant for outdoor display
  • Available in single-sided or double-sided printing
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and transport
  • Optional wire stakes available for ground installation

Important Note: All VBS yard signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Scoring involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire sign, allowing it to fold for optimal shipping while maintaining structural integrity.

VBS yard signs with different designs will be priced and processed as separate items per design. This ensures each unique VBS message or graphic receives proper attention during production.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Long-Lasting VBS Yard Sign Display

Our VBS yard signs are constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic, specifically chosen for church outdoor advertising applications. This material provides the ideal balance of durability, cost-effectiveness, and visual impact for VBS promotions.

Corrugated Plastic Specifications

  • Thickness: 4mm for optimal durability without excessive weight
  • Structure: Hollow fluted design runs horizontally on standard sheets
  • Color: Bright white base for excellent print contrast
  • Weather Resistance: Fully waterproof for outdoor VBS campaigns
  • Flexibility: Resistant to cracking and breaking during installation

Material Benefits for VBS Applications

The corrugated plastic construction makes these signs ideal for church VBS promotions because they can withstand various weather conditions while maintaining their professional appearance. The lightweight nature allows for easy repositioning throughout your VBS marketing campaign.

Sizing Note: All corrugated plastic VBS yard signs are trimmed 1/8" on each side during finishing. For example, an 18" x 24" sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75" when shipped. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 if precise measurements are required for your VBS installation.

  • Full Bleed: VBS graphics extend completely to sign edges

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided: VBS design printed on front face only

Installation Hardware

Wire installation stakes are available to add to your VBS yard sign order. These stakes provide secure ground mounting for both single and double-sided signs, ensuring your VBS promotion remains stable in outdoor conditions.

Scoring for Large VBS Signs

VBS yard signs exceeding 32" x 48" in any direction receive automatic scoring and folding. This process cuts through the top layer only, allowing the sign to fold for shipping while maintaining structural integrity for display.

Churches requiring flat shipping for large VBS signs can contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 or visit our oversized flat shipping options.

VBS Yard Sign FAQ

How durable are VBS yard signs for outdoor use?

Our VBS yard signs are made from waterproof 4mm corrugated plastic that withstands rain, wind, and sun exposure. They maintain their appearance throughout typical VBS campaign periods and can be stored for future church events.

What size VBS yard signs work best for roadside visibility?

18" x 24" and 24" x 36" are popular sizes for VBS yard signs, providing excellent visibility while remaining cost-effective. Larger sizes like 36" x 48" offer maximum impact for high-traffic locations.

Can I order different VBS designs in one order?

Yes, but each unique VBS design is priced and processed separately. This ensures proper attention to each design's specific requirements and color accuracy.

Do large VBS yard signs get folded for shipping?

Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. The scoring process doesn't damage the sign - it simply allows folding while maintaining structural integrity for display.

Are installation stakes included with VBS yard signs?

Wire installation stakes are available as an add-on option during ordering. These stakes work with both single and double-sided VBS yard signs for secure ground installation.

How far in advance should I order VBS yard signs?

We recommend ordering 2-3 weeks before your VBS starts to allow time for design, production, and delivery. Rush options are available if you need signs sooner.

Can VBS yard signs be reused for next year?

Yes, our corrugated plastic construction is durable enough for multiple uses. Store signs in a dry location between VBS seasons to maintain their quality and appearance.

Frequently Asked Questions

What should I include in my Veterans Day banner design?

Effective Veterans Day memorial banners typically include patriotic imagery (flags, eagles, military insignia), tribute text honoring veterans, specific military branch recognition if applicable, and memorial dates or event information. Consider including local veteran names or military unit designations for personalized tribute impact. Our design team can help ensure appropriate and respectful military imagery usage.

Can I order a double-sided Veterans Day banner?

Yes, double-sided Veterans Day banners are available for memorial displays visible from multiple directions, such as parade installations or central memorial locations. Double-sided printing allows different memorial messages on each side or identical tribute presentation. Additional material and printing costs apply for double-sided memorial banner production.

What is the best way to hang a Veterans Day banner?

For outdoor Veterans Day memorial ceremonies, reinforced grommets with rope or chain provide secure installation. Pole pockets work well for parade participation and formal processions. Indoor memorial displays can utilize adhesive backing for wall mounting or lightweight hanging systems. Consider wind conditions and display duration when selecting appropriate hanging methods for your Veterans Day memorial banner.

How long do outdoor Veterans Day banners last?

Premium 13oz vinyl Veterans Day banners typically maintain excellent appearance for 2-3 years of continuous outdoor exposure. Shorter memorial display periods (weeks to months) show minimal weather effects. UV-resistant inks prevent fading, while reinforced edges resist wind damage. Storage between Veterans Day annual events significantly extends banner lifespan for recurring memorial use.

What sizes are available for Veterans Day banners?

Standard Veterans Day banner sizes range from 2'x4' for indoor memorial displays up to 8'x50' for large outdoor installations. Popular memorial ceremony sizes include 3'x6', 4'x8', and 6'x12' banners. Custom sizes available for specific memorial spaces, VFW halls, or unique installation requirements. Large banners may require folded shipping unless freight delivery is selected.

  • Industry trade show participation

Each veterinary banner application benefits from professional design that reflects the expertise and care associated with quality veterinary practices.

Veterinary Banner Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Professional veterinary banner printing requires properly prepared artwork files that ensure crisp text, accurate colors, and sharp logo reproduction. Following these specifications guarantees your veterinary banner meets professional standards.

File Format Requirements:

  • PDF (preferred for veterinary logos and text)
  • Adobe Illustrator (.ai) files with embedded fonts
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG (minimum 150 DPI at full size)
  • TIFF files for photographic elements

Resolution Guidelines:

Veterinary banner artwork should be created at 150 DPI at full banner size, or 300 DPI at half size. This ensures veterinary clinic logos and text remain sharp when printed at large banner dimensions.

Color Specifications:

  • CMYK color mode for accurate veterinary brand colors
  • Include Pantone color references for precise logo matching
  • RGB files acceptable but may experience slight color shifts

Design Guidelines:

  • Include 1/4" bleed area around all banner edges
  • Keep critical text and logos 2" from banner edges
  • Use fonts larger than 1/4" height for optimal readability
  • Provide vector formats for veterinary logos when possible

Our graphic design team reviews all veterinary banner artwork and will contact you if files require modification to meet printing standards.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Veterinary Banners for Your Practice

Ready to enhance your veterinary practice marketing with professional custom banners? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to create veterinary banners that attract new clients and promote your services effectively.

Simple Three-Step Process:

  1. Choose Your Specifications: Select banner size, material, and finishing options that match your veterinary clinic needs
  2. Upload Your Design: Submit your veterinary practice artwork or request professional design assistance
  3. Review and Approve: Our team ensures your veterinary banner meets quality standards before production begins

Professional design services are available if you need assistance creating veterinary banner artwork. Our graphic designers understand veterinary industry standards and can help develop banners that communicate professionalism and expertise.

Quality Guarantee: Every veterinary banner undergoes thorough quality control inspection. If your banner doesn't meet our standards, we'll remake it at no additional cost.

Customer Support: Our experienced customer service team is available Monday through Friday to assist with veterinary banner orders, artwork questions, and delivery coordination.

Start your veterinary banner order today using our online configurator, or contact our team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with your veterinary practice marketing needs.

For unique veterinary banner requirements or volume orders, request a custom quote for specialized pricing and production options.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Veterinary Banners

What banner size works best for veterinary clinic storefronts?

Most veterinary practices choose banners between 3'x6' and 4'x8' for storefront applications. These sizes provide excellent visibility for passing traffic while fitting standard building proportions. Consider your building facade dimensions and local signage regulations when selecting veterinary banner size.

Can veterinary banners withstand outdoor weather exposure?

Yes, our veterinary banners are manufactured using 13oz vinyl material designed for outdoor durability. They resist UV fading, moisture damage, and wind stress typical in outdoor veterinary clinic installations. Proper installation with appropriate finishing options ensures maximum weather resistance.

Do you offer design services for veterinary practice banners?

Professional design services are available for veterinary banners. Our graphic designers understand veterinary industry standards and can create banners that reflect your practice's professionalism. Design services include logo integration, text layout, and color coordination.

What's the typical production time for veterinary banner orders?

Standard veterinary banner production requires 3-5 business days after artwork approval. Rush production (1-2 days) is available for urgent veterinary marketing needs. Production time begins after design approval and payment processing completion.

Can I reorder the same veterinary banner design later?

Yes, we maintain veterinary banner design files for easy reordering. Account holders can access previous orders and modify specifications if needed. This is particularly useful for veterinary practices with multiple locations or recurring promotional campaigns.

What file types work best for veterinary logos and text?

Vector formats (PDF, AI) provide the best quality for veterinary logos and text elements. High-resolution images (300 DPI) also work well. Our design team will review your veterinary banner artwork and contact you if file modifications are needed for optimal printing results.

Are volume discounts available for multiple veterinary banners?

Volume pricing is available for veterinary practices ordering multiple banners or establishing ongoing marketing campaigns. Contact our sales team to discuss discount options for larger veterinary banner orders or multi-location veterinary groups.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Vinyl Banners

What vinyl banner material should I choose: 13 oz vs. 18 oz?

13 oz vinyl is ideal for indoor displays and short-term outdoor use (up to 6 months). 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl is recommended for long-term outdoor installations, high-wind areas, and permanent displays lasting 1-3 years. The heavier material provides superior durability and weather resistance.

How long do vinyl banners last outdoors?

With proper installation and care, 13 oz vinyl banners typically last 6-12 months outdoors, while 18 oz banners can last 1-3 years. UV-resistant inks and weatherproof materials help maintain color vibrancy throughout their lifespan. Indoor banners can last several years with minimal fading.

Are vinyl banners weatherproof and UV-resistant?

Yes, all our vinyl banner materials are weatherproof and printed with UV-resistant inks. They can withstand rain, snow, wind, and sun exposure without significant deterioration. However, extreme weather conditions may affect longevity.

What's the best banner for windy locations?

For high-wind areas, we recommend 18 oz vinyl with mesh material options that allow wind to pass through, reducing stress on mounting hardware. Proper installation with adequate grommets and secure mounting is also crucial for wind resistance.

Do I need hems, and when?

Hems add strength and durability to banner edges, especially important for outdoor installations and banners with grommets. Heat-welded hems provide the strongest edge seal, while sewn hems offer traditional reinforcement. Hems are recommended for all outdoor banners.

Do vinyl banners come with grommets?

Grommets are available as a finishing option and are recommended for most hanging applications. Standard placement is approximately every 2 feet along the banner edges, but custom spacing can be specified based on your installation requirements.

How are grommets placed, and can I choose placement?

Grommets are typically placed every 24 inches along the top edge and optionally on other edges. You can specify custom grommet placement during ordering to match your specific mounting hardware or installation requirements.

Can I order custom sizes or shapes?

Yes, we offer custom sizing for vinyl banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. Custom shapes and die-cut options are also available. Contact us for a custom quote on specialty sizes or unique shape requirements.

What are pole pockets, and what size do I need?

Pole pockets are sewn sleeves along banner edges that accommodate mounting hardware like poles or rods. Common sizes are 2" and 3" pockets. The size depends on your mounting hardware diameter - measure your pole and add 1/2" for easy insertion.

What finish should I choose: gloss or matte?

Gloss finish provides vibrant colors with high shine for maximum visual impact, ideal for most applications. Matte finish reduces glare and reflections, making it easier to read in bright lighting conditions or when viewed from multiple angles.

Can vinyl banners be used indoors and outdoors?

Yes, vinyl banners are versatile and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Indoor applications benefit from longer lifespan and color retention, while outdoor installations showcase the material's weather resistance and durability.

What file types and resolution work best for printing?

We prefer PDF, AI, EPS, or PSD files with vector graphics for text and logos. Raster images should be 150 DPI minimum at final print size. CMYK color mode ensures accurate color reproduction. Include 2" bleed and keep important elements 4" from edges.

Will I receive a proof before printing?

Yes, every vinyl banner order receives a digital proof for approval before production begins. This allows you to review colors, layout, and text for accuracy. Production starts only after you approve the proof.

How do I hang a vinyl banner securely?

Use appropriate mounting hardware for your installation surface. Grommets work well with bungee cords, zip ties, or rope. Pole pockets accommodate mounting poles or rods. Ensure adequate support points and consider wind load for outdoor installations.

What is the best way to clean my vinyl banner?

Clean vinyl banners with mild soap and water using a soft cloth or sponge. Avoid abrasive cleaners or scrubbing that could damage the print surface. Rinse thoroughly and allow to dry completely before storage or reinstallation.

How do I best store my banner to keep reusing it?

Store vinyl banners rolled (not folded) in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Use the original shipping tube when possible, or wrap in protective material. Avoid storing in extreme temperatures or humid conditions that could cause material deterioration.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

  • Chemical Resistance: Vinyl surface resists staining from industrial environments
  • Temperature Range: Maintains flexibility and durability in extreme weather conditions

All waste management banners are printed using latex inks that provide superior adhesion to vinyl and excellent outdoor fade resistance. The material maintains its professional appearance throughout extended outdoor exposure at waste management facilities.

Please note that vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some size fluctuation can occur due to heat application during printing and outdoor climate exposure. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot.

Pole Pockets:

  • Ideal for trade show displays and temporary signage
  • Easy installation and removal without tools
  • Clean removal without surface damage

Waste Management Banner Questions & Answers

What material works best for outdoor waste management facility installations?

Our 13oz scrim vinyl provides excellent durability for waste management facilities. This heavy-duty material resists tearing from wind stress, maintains color vibrancy through UV exposure, and withstands the industrial environments common at waste management facilities.

How long do waste management banners last outdoors?

Professional vinyl banners typically maintain excellent appearance for 2-3 years with continuous outdoor exposure. Factors affecting lifespan include UV exposure, wind conditions, and industrial environment exposure. Proper installation and finishing maximize banner durability.

Can you match our company's brand colors exactly?

Yes, we can match corporate colors using Pantone color references. Provide your company's Pantone color numbers with your artwork, and our printing process will match your brand colors as closely as possible on vinyl material.

What size banner works best for facility gate installations?

For waste management facility gates, 4x8 feet or 5x10 feet banners provide excellent visibility for approaching vehicles. Consider your gate width and viewing distance when selecting size. Our team can recommend optimal sizing based on your specific installation location.

Do you offer installation services for waste management banners?

We focus on manufacturing high-quality banners and recommend working with local sign installers for facility installations. Our finishing options (grommets, pole pockets) are designed for straightforward installation by your maintenance team or local contractors.

Can banners include safety messages or regulatory information?

Absolutely. Many waste management companies include safety reminders, hours of operation, emergency contacts, or regulatory compliance information on their facility banners. Our design team can incorporate required messaging while maintaining professional appearance.

What's the largest banner size you can produce?

We can produce banners up to 8x50 feet for large facility installations. Banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions require freight shipping. For oversized installations, we can produce multiple panels designed to install as a seamless display.

How do I submit artwork for my waste management banner?

Upload artwork files through our online ordering system, or email large files directly to our design team. We accept PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution image files. Our team will review your artwork and contact you if any adjustments are needed for optimal printing.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Water Park Banners for Pool & Recreation Facilities

Make the most of your water park or pool facility with eye-catching vinyl banners designed for outdoor recreation use. From pool deck safety announcements and attraction signage to event promotions and sponsor displays, custom water park banners help improve visibility and create memorable experiences for your guests.

Our water park banners are printed on durable vinyl material that withstands chlorine exposure, moisture, and outdoor UV conditions. Each banner is custom printed using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors that remain bright in pool and outdoor environments.

Available in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', our water park banners can be customized for any installation including pool fencing, facility entrances, cabana areas, and recreation zones. Choose from multiple finishing options including grommets for easy hanging and pole pockets for professional mounting systems.

All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA with strict quality checks by our experienced production team. Our in-house graphic designers review every order to ensure your water park banner meets professional standards for outdoor recreation use.

Note: Due to shipping regulations, vinyl banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. Contact us for freight quote options if folding is not acceptable for your installation.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Material for Water Park Installations

Your water park banner is constructed with premium vinyl material specifically chosen for durability in pool and outdoor recreation environments. Our material withstands chlorine exposure, moisture, and UV rays while maintaining vibrant color reproduction.

13oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our standard 13oz vinyl provides excellent durability for most water park applications including pool deck signage, attraction banners, and facility announcements. This material offers strong tear resistance and professional appearance for indoor and outdoor use.

18oz Vinyl Banner Material

Heavy-duty 18oz vinyl is recommended for high-wind areas, permanent installations, and large format water park banners. This premium material provides maximum durability for pool fencing applications and long-term outdoor display.

Both material options are printed using latex inks that resist fading and maintain color vibrancy in chlorinated and outdoor environments typical of water park facilities.

Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material with acceptable size variance up to 1/2 inch per linear foot due to heat application during printing and finishing processes.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Water Park Banner Finishing Options for Pool & Outdoor Use

Choose from professional finishing options designed for water park and pool facility installations:

Grommets

Brass grommets placed every 2 feet along banner edges provide secure mounting points for pool fencing, cabana installations, and facility signage. Grommets resist corrosion in chlorinated environments.

Pole Pockets

Reinforced pole pockets accommodate mounting systems commonly used in water park facilities. Available in top, bottom, or side configurations for professional display systems.

Hemming

Double-fold hem finishing provides clean edges and additional durability for water park banners exposed to wind and weather conditions.

Rope Reinforcement

Rope reinforcement along banner edges increases tear resistance for large format installations and high-wind pool environments.

All finishing options are designed to maintain banner integrity in moisture-rich environments typical of water park and pool facilities.

Water park banners serve multiple functions in pool and recreation facility operations:

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your water park banner:

File Resolution Requirements

Submit artwork at 150 DPI minimum at actual print size. Higher resolution files produce sharper text and graphics for water park banner applications viewed at close distances.

Accepted File Formats

PDF, AI, EPS, and high-resolution JPG files accepted. Vector formats (AI, EPS) recommended for text-heavy water park banners to ensure crisp lettering.

Color Specifications

CMYK color mode required for accurate color reproduction. RGB files will be converted and may result in color shifts. Pantone colors can be matched for brand consistency.

Safety Area Guidelines

Keep critical text and graphics at least 2 inches from banner edges to account for finishing processes and potential size variance in vinyl material.

Design Review Service

Water Park Banner Questions & Answers

Will my water park banner resist chlorine and pool chemicals?

Yes, our vinyl banner material and inks are designed to withstand chlorinated environments. The material will not deteriorate or fade when exposed to typical pool chemical concentrations found in water park facilities.

What size water park banner can you produce?

We produce custom water park banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. Larger sizes may be available through custom quote for specialty installations. Contact us to discuss oversized banner requirements for your facility.

How long will my water park banner last outdoors?

With proper installation and care, water park banners typically last 2-3 years in outdoor pool environments. Lifespan depends on weather exposure, installation method, and local climate conditions.

Can you match my water park's brand colors?

Yes, we can match Pantone colors and work with your brand guidelines to ensure color consistency across your water park signage. Provide Pantone numbers or brand color specifications with your order.

What finishing option is best for pool fence installation?

Grommets are recommended for pool fence installations as they provide secure mounting points and resist corrosion in chlorinated environments. Space grommets every 2 feet for optimal support in windy conditions.

Do you offer design services for water park banners?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom artwork for your water park banner project. Design services include logo recreation, text layout, and optimization for outdoor visibility.

How should I care for my water park banner?

Clean your water park banner periodically with mild soap and water to remove chlorine residue and dirt. Avoid harsh chemicals or pressure washing that could damage the vinyl material or printing.

Can I get a custom quote for multiple water park banners?

Yes, we provide custom pricing for bulk orders and ongoing water park banner needs. Submit your project requirements through our custom quote form for volume pricing and dedicated account service.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a wedding banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of wedding banner printing and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made wedding banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom wedding banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your wedding banner is delivered when you need it.

Why Choose Our Wedding Banners?

Your wedding banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All wedding banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of wedding banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance).

Wedding Banner Artwork Requirements for Custom Printing

Ensure your wedding banner prints with professional quality by following these artwork specifications:

File Format Requirements - Submit wedding banner artwork in high-resolution PDF, AI, EPS, or PSD formats for best printing results.

Resolution Guidelines - Provide artwork at 150 DPI minimum for wedding banners. Higher resolution files ensure crisp text and clear imagery for your celebration.

Color Specifications - CMYK color mode recommended for wedding banner printing. RGB files will be converted and may result in slight color variations.

Text and Font Guidelines - Ensure all text is outlined or fonts are embedded. Minimum text size of 1 inch for optimal readability on wedding banners.

Design Layout - Include 0.25" bleed area around wedding banner artwork. Keep important text and design elements at least 1" from banner edges.

Professional Design Services - Our in-house graphic designers can create custom wedding banner artwork or modify your existing designs to ensure optimal printing results.

Wedding Banner FAQ

Are wedding banners waterproof for outdoor ceremonies?

Our premium vinyl wedding banners are weather-resistant and suitable for outdoor wedding ceremonies. They can withstand light rain and outdoor conditions, making them perfect for garden weddings and outdoor celebrations.

How do I hang my wedding banner?

Wedding banner hanging options depend on your chosen finishing. Grommets work well with rope or bungee cords for ceremony backdrops. Pole pockets slide easily onto poles or stands for reception displays. Our customer service team can recommend the best hanging method for your wedding venue.

Can I order a double-sided wedding banner?

Yes, we offer double-sided wedding banners perfect for ceremony installations where guests will view the banner from both sides. Double-sided printing ensures your wedding message is visible from all angles.

How durable are custom wedding banners?

Our wedding banners are printed on premium vinyl material designed to last throughout your celebration and beyond. With proper care, your wedding banner can serve as a lasting keepsake of your special day.

Can I customize wedding banners with my own design?

Absolutely! You can upload your own wedding artwork or use our online designer to create custom wedding banners. Our in-house design team can also assist with creating or modifying designs to ensure perfect results for your celebration.

How quickly can I receive my wedding banner after ordering?

Production times vary from same-day to 3-5 business days depending on your selected option. Add shipping time based on your chosen delivery method. Rush production and expedited shipping are available for tight wedding timelines.

Vinyl Proposal Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Installation

Our proposal banners are printed on premium 13oz scrim vinyl, specifically chosen for its durability and professional appearance in both indoor and outdoor wedding environments.

13oz Scrim Vinyl Specifications:

  • Weather-resistant material suitable for outdoor proposals
  • Smooth surface for vibrant color reproduction
  • Tear-resistant construction for reliable display
  • UV-resistant inks prevent fading in sunlight
  • Flexible material for easy transport and setup

Material Performance:

  • Temperature range: -20°F to 160°F

  • Waterproof surface for outdoor use

  • Rust-resistant aluminum grommets every 2 feet
  • Perfect for rope, bungee cord, or zip tie installation

Pole Pockets:

  • Available on top, bottom, or both sides
  • 2" or 3" pocket sizes to fit standard poles
  • Clean, professional appearance without visible hardware
  • Ideal for banner stands or pole mounting systems

Wind Slits:

  • Strategic cuts to reduce wind resistance
  • Recommended for banners over 20 square feet
  • Helps prevent tearing in windy conditions
  • Available on request for outdoor proposals

Reinforced Corners:

  • Additional vinyl welded at stress points
  • Extra durability for long-term display
  • Prevents corner tearing under tension

Artwork Requirements for Proposal Banner Printing

Ensure your proposal banner prints perfectly with these artwork guidelines and specifications:

File Format Requirements:

  • PDF (preferred), AI, EPS, or PSD files
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG (300 DPI minimum)
  • Vector formats recommended for text and logos
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction

Resolution & Size Guidelines:

  • Large format printing: 100-150 DPI at final size
  • Vector artwork scales without quality loss
  • Raster images should be sized appropriately
  • Avoid low-resolution web images (72 DPI)

Design Layout Requirements:

  • Include 2" bleed area around design edges
  • Keep important text 3" from banner edges
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text
  • Use high contrast for maximum readability

Color Specifications:

  • CMYK color profile for print accuracy
  • Pantone colors can be converted to CMYK
  • Rich blacks use C:40 M:40 Y:40 K:100
  • Avoid pure white for outdoor banners (use light gray)

Text & Font Guidelines:

  • Minimum text size: 2" for distance viewing
  • Outline all fonts or include font files
  • Sans-serif fonts recommended for clarity
  • Bold weights improve readability

Design Services Available:

Don't have artwork? Our experienced design team can create your proposal banner from your ideas, photos, and text. Design services include unlimited revisions until you're completely satisfied.

Proposal Banner Questions & Answers

What size proposal banner should I order?

Banner size depends on your location and viewing distance. For intimate proposals, 2'x4' to 3'x6' works well. For public displays or distant viewing, consider 4'x8' or larger. Our team can recommend the ideal size based on your specific proposal plans.

How long will my proposal banner last outdoors?

Our vinyl proposal banners are designed for 2-3 years of outdoor use with proper care. For short-term proposal displays (days or weeks), they'll maintain perfect appearance. UV-resistant inks prevent fading in sunlight.

Can I get my proposal banner delivered overnight?

Yes! We offer rush production (1-2 business days) combined with overnight shipping for urgent proposals. Contact us by phone for same-day artwork approval when possible.

What if I need help with my proposal banner design?

Our experienced design team specializes in proposal banners and can create your design from scratch. Simply provide your text, any photos, and basic preferences - we'll handle the rest with unlimited revisions.

Will my proposal banner work in windy conditions?

Yes, with proper installation. Choose hemmed edges with grommets for secure mounting, and consider wind slits for banners over 20 square feet. Our team can recommend the best installation method for your location.

Can I include photos in my proposal banner design?

Absolutely! Photos add a personal touch to proposal banners. Provide high-resolution images (300 DPI minimum), and our team will optimize them for large-format printing to ensure they look perfect on your banner.

What colors work best for outdoor proposal banners?

High contrast combinations work best for visibility. Classic choices include white or light text on dark backgrounds, or dark text on light backgrounds. Our design team can recommend colors based on your proposal location and lighting conditions.

Do you offer a money-back guarantee?

Yes! We guarantee your satisfaction with every proposal banner. If you're not completely happy with the final product, we'll work with you to make it right or provide a full refund.

Frequently Asked Questions About Winery Banners

What materials work best for outdoor vineyard banner displays?

Our premium vinyl materials are specifically designed for outdoor vineyard conditions, offering UV resistance and weather durability needed for wine country climates. All materials maintain color vibrancy for wine business branding even in direct sunlight exposure.

Can you match specific wine brand colors for banner printing?

Yes, our color matching process can reproduce wine brand colors accurately using CMYK printing standards. Provide your brand color specifications or wine label references for precise color matching on your winery banner.

What banner sizes work best for wine tasting room displays?

Popular winery banner sizes for tasting room displays range from 2'x4' to 4'x8', depending on your space requirements. Our team can recommend optimal sizing based on your wine tasting room layout and visibility needs.

Do you offer rush production for wine festival deadlines?

Yes, rush production options are available for urgent wine event deadlines. Same-day and next-day production may be available depending on your winery banner specifications and current production schedule.

Can winery banners withstand outdoor wine festival conditions?

Our winery banners are designed for outdoor wine festival use, featuring weather-resistant materials and reinforced finishing options that perform well in various outdoor wine event conditions while maintaining professional appearance.

What artwork do I need to provide for my winery banner?

High-resolution wine business logos, vineyard photography, or complete banner designs work best. Our design team can also create custom winery banner artwork using your wine brand guidelines and vineyard imagery.

Yacht Club Banner Questions & Answers

What yacht banner material works best for marina environments?

For yacht club and marina installations, we recommend 13oz or 15oz scrim vinyl for standard applications, or 18oz heavy-duty vinyl for permanent yacht banner displays. These materials offer excellent weather resistance against salt air, UV rays, and marina conditions.

How long do yacht banners last in marine environments?

Our yacht banners typically last 3-5 years in marina conditions when properly installed and maintained. Marine-grade materials and UV-resistant printing ensure your yacht club banners maintain their professional appearance throughout multiple seasons.

Can yacht banners be customized with our yacht club logo and colors?

Absolutely! We specialize in custom yacht banners featuring yacht club logos, marina branding, and specific color schemes. Our design team can work with your existing yacht club artwork or create new marina-themed designs.

What's the best size yacht banner for marina fence displays?

Popular yacht banner sizes for marina fence installations include 3'x8', 4'x8', and 5'x10'. The ideal size depends on your yacht club fence dimensions and viewing distance requirements. Contact us for yacht banner size recommendations specific to your marina.

Do yacht banners include grommets for marina installation?

Yes, our yacht banners include reinforced grommets every 2 feet as standard, perfect for yacht club fence mounting and marina installations. We also offer custom grommet spacing and pole pocket options for specific yacht banner mounting needs.

Can large yacht banners be shipped without folding to our marina?

Yacht banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions require folding for standard shipping. However, we offer freight shipping options to deliver large yacht banners to your marina without folding. Contact us for yacht banner freight shipping quotes.

What artwork resolution is needed for yacht banner printing?

We recommend 300 DPI resolution at actual yacht banner size for optimal print quality. For large yacht club banners over 10 feet, 150 DPI minimum is acceptable. Our design team can help optimize your yacht club artwork for professional marina display.

ABC Yard Sign Letters - Frequently Asked Questions

What material are yard letters printed on?

Our alphabet yard letters are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast), a lightweight yet durable material that's waterproof, UV-resistant, and perfect for outdoor display. The hollow fluted construction provides strength while keeping the letters easy to handle and install.

Are yard letter signs waterproof?

Yes, both the coroplast material and UV-resistant inks are completely waterproof. Your letters will maintain their appearance and structural integrity through rain, snow, and outdoor moisture exposure.

What font styles can I choose from?

We offer three professional font options: Capucine Basic Italic for elegant script styling, Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy for bold readability, and Urbane Rounded Heavy for friendly, approachable lettering. All fonts are optimized for outdoor visibility.

Are they printed in color?

Yes, all letters are printed in full color using our digital printing process. Template designs include vibrant colors, patterns, and special effects like glitter and gradients that maintain their appearance outdoors.

I don't want to fuss with individual letters. Do you make a yard letter sign that already says Happy Birthday — or something else?

While this product provides individual letters for maximum flexibility, we do offer pre-made message signs for common celebrations. Contact our customer service team to discuss custom single-piece sign options for specific messages.

How tall and wide are these letters?

All letters are cut to 18" tall for consistent visibility. Width varies by letter design - narrow letters like "I" are approximately 4" wide, while wider letters like "M" or "W" are approximately 14" wide. This proportional sizing ensures balanced, readable displays.

Happy Birthday Yard Sign Questions & Installation Support

What material are Happy Birthday yard signs printed on?

Happy Birthday yard signs are digitally printed on 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This waterproof, UV-resistant material is specifically designed for outdoor use and provides excellent durability for birthday party installations lasting several days.

Are Happy Birthday yard signs weatherproof for outdoor celebrations?

Yes, these birthday signs are fully weatherproof with UV-resistant inks and waterproof corrugated plastic construction. They withstand rain, wind, and sun exposure, making them ideal for outdoor lawn displays and multi-day birthday celebrations.

What font styles are available for Happy Birthday yard signs?

Three professional font options are available: Capucine Basic Italic for elegant celebrations, Helvetica Neue Heavy for bold visibility, and Urbane Rounded Heavy for modern, friendly appearances. All fonts are optimized for outdoor readability from street view.

Can I get additional customization for my Happy Birthday yard signs?

Yes, custom design modifications are available through customer service including specific color matching, logo integration, and unique template adjustments. Contact our design team to discuss special customization requirements for your birthday celebration.

What are the dimensions of Happy Birthday yard sign letters?

Standard letter height is 18 inches for optimal outdoor visibility. Letter width varies based on the specific character (for example, "I" is narrower than "M") to maintain proper proportions. Total display width depends on the length of your custom message.

How do I install Happy Birthday yard signs in my lawn?

Happy Birthday yard signs can be installed using wire frame stakes (recommended), zip-tied to fences, or mounted with ground stakes. Installation hardware is available separately, and our customer service team can recommend the best mounting method for your specific location and display duration.

Are yard number signs waterproof for outdoor use?

Yes, these number signs are completely waterproof and weather-resistant. The coroplast material and UV-resistant inks ensure your yard numbers maintain their appearance throughout outdoor sports events, celebrations, and extended display periods.

Can I order yard numbers in full color?

Absolutely! All yard number signs are printed in full color using professional digital printing. Choose from over 20 colorful template designs including sports themes, glitter effects, patterns, and celebration styles to match your event.

What font styles are available for yard numbers?

We offer three professional font options: Capucine Basic Italic (elegant script style), Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy (bold modern font), and Urbane Rounded Heavy (friendly rounded numbers). Each font is optimized for visibility and professional appearance.

How do I customize individual yard number signs?

Simply select your preferred template design and font style during the ordering process. Each order includes a complete set of numbers 0-9, allowing you to display any combination needed for your event. No additional design work is required.

What are the dimensions of yard number signs?

All yard number signs are cut to 18" height for optimal visibility. The width varies depending on the specific numeral (for example, "1" is narrower than "8"). The consistent 18" height ensures uniform appearance when displaying multiple numbers together.

Custom Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Durability

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Custom sized yard signs serve as a flexible advertising solution for businesses, political campaigns, real estate listings, and special events. These corrugated plastic signs are manufactured from lightweight 4mm material that withstands outdoor weather conditions while remaining cost-effective compared to other signage methods.

Our custom yard signs are digitally printed in full color on durable white corrugated plastic material. This material features hollow flutes running horizontally, similar to cardboard construction, providing structural strength while maintaining lightweight portability. The 4mm corrugated plastic is waterproof and UV-resistant, making it ideal for extended outdoor display.

Please note: All coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. an 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship as 17.75" x 23.75"). If your yard sign needs precise dimensions, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific application.

Custom Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Durability

Custom yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), a durable material specifically designed for outdoor signage applications. This lightweight yet sturdy material features hollow flutes that run horizontally across standard 4' x 8' sheets, providing structural integrity while maintaining portability.

Material Properties

  • Thickness: 4mm corrugated plastic construction
  • Weight: Lightweight for easy installation and transport
  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof and UV-resistant for outdoor use
  • Color: White base material for optimal print vibrancy
  • Durability: Suitable for extended outdoor exposure

The corrugated plastic construction allows for both single-sided and double-sided printing options, accommodating various advertising needs. The material's hollow flute design provides excellent strength-to-weight ratio, making yard signs easy to handle while maintaining professional appearance.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Sized Yard Signs

Edge Finishing

  • White Margin: 1/2" white border around printed area
  • Full Bleed: Ink printed to the edge of the sign

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided: Printing on one side only
  • Double-Sided: Full-color printing on both sides

Available Accessories

  • H Stakes: Available for 10x15, 10x24, or 10x30 signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty ground mounting option
  • Black Zip Ties: 12-inch length for secure mounting
  • White Zip Ties: 36-inch length for fence installation

Large Format Scoring

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or where height plus width equals 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Scoring involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire thickness, allowing the sign to fold for efficient shipping while maintaining structural integrity.

For applications requiring unfolded large format signs, oversized flat shipping options are available through our specialized shipping service.

Standard Shipping Parameters

Custom yard signs up to 32" x 48" ship flat without folding. Larger dimensions are automatically scored and folded to meet carrier size restrictions while maintaining sign integrity.

Automatic Scoring Policy

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" in any direction, or where combined height and width equals 81 inches or greater, receive automatic scoring. This process cuts through the top layer only, allowing controlled folding for efficient shipping.

Flat Shipping Options

Large format signs requiring flat shipping (without scoring or folding) are available through specialized oversized shipping services. Additional shipping charges apply for flat shipping of oversized yard signs.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Flat Rate Shipping: Predictable costs for standard-sized orders

Artwork Requirements for Yard Sign Printing

Preferred File Formats

Optimal print quality is achieved with .eps files converted to outlines. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable for yard sign printing. Vector-based artwork provides the best results for text and graphics.

Resolution Requirements

  • Minimum Resolution: 150 DPI at actual print size
  • Recommended Resolution: 300 DPI for optimal print quality
  • Large Format: 100 DPI acceptable for signs over 48 inches

Design Specifications

  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate printing
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed required for full-bleed designs
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 0.25" from edges
  • Font Requirements: Convert text to outlines or embed fonts

Artwork Services Available

  • File Review: Pre-production artwork analysis
  • Design Assistance: Professional design services available
  • Proof Options: Digital proofs for approval before printing
  • Color Matching: Custom color matching services

Submission Methods

Artwork files can be uploaded during the online ordering process or submitted via email for large files. Design consultation services are available for customers requiring assistance with artwork preparation.

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are custom yard signs made from?

Custom yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast). This durable, lightweight material is waterproof and UV-resistant, making it ideal for outdoor applications. The corrugated construction provides structural strength while maintaining easy portability.

Can I order double-sided custom yard signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for all custom yard sign sizes. Double-sided signs provide maximum visibility and message impact, allowing different designs or messages on each side. Both single-sided and double-sided options use the same durable 4mm corrugated plastic material.

What is the minimum order quantity for custom yard signs?

Custom yard signs can be ordered in quantities starting from a single sign. There is no minimum order requirement, making our service suitable for both individual customers and large-scale commercial orders.

What are custom yard signs commonly used for?

Custom yard signs serve diverse applications including business advertising, real estate marketing, political campaigns, event promotion, garage sales, and personal celebrations. Their versatility, affordability, and weather resistance make them effective for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor advertising needs.

What are the standard custom yard sign sizes available?

While we specialize in custom sizing, popular dimensions include 18"x24", 24"x36", and 12"x18". Custom sizes can accommodate virtually any dimension requirement. Signs larger than 32"x48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency.

What ground stake options are available for yard signs?

Available accessories include H-stakes for 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30 signs, heavy-duty beefy stakes for enhanced stability, 12-inch black zip ties, and 36-inch white zip ties for fence mounting applications.

Can I request a proof before my yard sign is printed?

Yes, digital proofs are available before production begins. Proof options include standard digital proofs and color match proof systems for critical color accuracy requirements. Proofs ensure your custom yard sign meets expectations before manufacturing.

What production times are available for custom yard signs?

Production options include 1-business-day priority, 2-business-day express, 3-business-day standard, and 5-business-day saver timelines. All production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. Shipping time is additional to production time.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Yard Signs for Lawn Advertising & Property Promotion

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they're lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They're also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

Corrugated Plastic Material for Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Display

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.

Full Color Digital Printing for Custom Yard Sign Graphics

Here at Banners.com, we want to make designing and displaying your yard sign easy. That's why we offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign.

Yard Sign Scoring & Large Format Handling

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Did we answer all your questions? If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Corrugated Plastic Material for Durable Yard Sign Construction

Our yard signs are constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material that delivers exceptional durability for outdoor lawn applications. This lightweight yet sturdy material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing structural integrity while remaining easy to handle and install.

The corrugated plastic construction offers several key advantages for yard sign applications:

  • Waterproof protection - Resists rain, snow, and moisture damage
  • Lightweight design - Easy to transport and install on lawn stakes
  • Impact resistant - Withstands wind and minor impacts without cracking
  • UV stable - Maintains structural integrity in direct sunlight
  • Temperature stable - Performs in both hot and cold weather conditions

The hollow flute design runs horizontally across standard 4' x 8' sheets, providing optimal strength for typical yard sign dimensions. This material accepts full-color digital printing on both single and double-sided applications.

For applications requiring exact dimensions, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific requirements, as standard finishing includes a 1/8" trim on all sides.

Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

To ensure the highest quality results for your custom yard signs, please follow these artwork specifications:

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred formats: PDF, AI, EPS, PSD
  • Acceptable formats: JPG, PNG, TIFF
  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI at actual print size
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Design Guidelines

  • Bleed area: Include 1/8" bleed on all sides for full-bleed designs
  • Safe zone: Keep important text and graphics 1/4" from edges
  • Text size: Minimum 12pt for readability from typical viewing distances
  • Font requirements: Embed or outline all fonts

Artwork Approval Process

  1. Upload your design - Submit files through our online system
  2. Proof generation - We create a digital proof for your review
  3. Review and approval - Check all text, colors, and layout carefully
  4. Production begins - Manufacturing starts after proof approval

Color Match Proof System

For critical color matching applications, we offer color match proofs to ensure your yard signs meet exact color specifications. This service is particularly valuable for:

  • Corporate brand colors
  • Political party colors
  • School or organization colors
  • Matching existing signage

Frequently Asked Questions About Yard Signs

What are yard signs?

Yard signs are lightweight promotional signs typically made from corrugated plastic material, designed for temporary outdoor display on lawns, properties, and roadsides. They're commonly used for real estate advertising, political campaigns, business promotion, and event announcements. Our yard signs feature full-color digital printing on durable 4mm corrugated plastic that withstands outdoor weather conditions.

What material are your yard signs printed on?

Our yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast). This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing lightweight yet durable performance. The corrugated plastic is waterproof, UV-resistant, and maintains its structural integrity in various weather conditions, making it ideal for outdoor advertising applications.

What are the most common yard sign sizes?

The most popular yard sign sizes include 18" x 24", 24" x 18", and 12" x 18" for standard lawn displays. Larger sizes like 24" x 36" and 18" x 36" are common for roadside advertising and political campaigns. We also offer custom sizes to meet specific application requirements. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping.

Can my yard signs be printed double-sided?

Yes, we offer both single-sided and double-sided printing options. Double-sided yard signs provide maximum visibility for applications where people will view the sign from both directions, such as corner lots or high-traffic areas. Both sides can feature the same design or completely different graphics depending on your needs.

Do you offer bulk pricing for yard signs?

Yes, we provide volume discounts for larger quantity orders. Bulk pricing is automatically calculated in our online ordering system based on your quantity selection. For very large orders or ongoing campaigns, contact our business sales team to discuss additional volume pricing options and business account benefits.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer four production speeds: 1 business day (priority), 2 business days (express), 3 business days (standard), and 5 business days (saver). Turnaround time begins after artwork approval and payment processing are complete. Production times are calculated in business days (Monday-Friday), excluding weekends and holidays.

Do yard signs come with stakes, and can I order extras?

Yard signs do not automatically include stakes, but we offer several staking options as add-ons during checkout. Available options include H-stakes for various sign sizes, heavy-duty "beefy" stakes for windy conditions, and zip ties for fence mounting. You can order additional stakes separately if needed for multiple installations.

Can I display a yard sign without stakes?

Yes, yard signs can be displayed in several ways beyond ground stakes. Alternative installation methods include zip-tying to fences, mounting on posts or stands, attaching to building exteriors (where permitted), or using as handheld signs for events. The lightweight corrugated plastic construction makes yard signs versatile for various display applications.

Are yard signs weather-resistant, and how should I store them?

Our corrugated plastic yard signs are designed for outdoor use and resist rain, snow, and UV exposure. However, extreme weather conditions like severe storms or hail may cause damage. For long-term storage, keep signs in a dry location away from extreme temperatures. The material can become brittle in very cold conditions, so avoid flexing signs when temperatures are below freezing.
